source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: 5 x 5 area
Casting Cost: 15 mana
Upkeep: none
Turns a 5 x 5 area into thick, sticking mud for the duration of a battle. Mud costs a unit (enemy or friendly) all its movement points to enter. Flying and non-corporeal units are unaffected.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：5 x 5 範圍
施法花費：15 法力
維護：無
在戰鬥持續期間，將 5 x 5 範圍化為濃稠黏滑的泥地。任何單位（敵方或友方）進入泥地格都需耗盡其所有移動力。飛行及非實體單位不受影響。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 5/25 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Gives a target unit increased resistance (+3) to the elemental magics of chaos and nature, and improved defense against normal magic ranged attacks (+3 to ranged defense).
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一單位
施法花費：5/25 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
使目標單位對混沌與自然系的元素魔法獲得更高抗性（+3），並提升對普通魔法遠程攻擊的防禦（遠程防禦+3）。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: city
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Surrounds a target city with a sturdy stone wall.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：城市
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
以堅固的石牆環繞目標城市。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 8/40 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Makes a target unit's creatures stronger (adds +1 to each figure's melee attack strength).
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一單位
施法花費：8/40 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
使目標單位的生物更為強壯（每個個體的近戰攻擊強度+1）。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 10 mana
Upkeep: none
Casts a sticky, 12 hit point web over a target unit. Creatures cannot move until they destroy the web with melee and magic ranged attacks. Web remnants prevent flying units from flying for the rest of the battle.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一單位
施法花費：10 法力
維護：無
在目標單位上罩下一張黏稠、具 12 點生命值的蛛網。生物在以近戰與魔法遠程攻擊摧毀蛛網之前無法移動。殘留的網絲使飛行單位在該場戰鬥剩餘時間內無法飛行。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 70 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Summons a group of ferocious bears.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：70 法力
維護：2 法力/回合
召喚一群兇猛的熊。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 100 mana
Upkeep: 3 mana/turn
Summons sprites. Sprites are small, flying forest creatures that can hurl tiny magic attacks over long distances.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：100 法力
維護：3 法力/回合
召喚妖精。妖精是體型嬌小的飛行森林生物，能在遠距離投射細小的魔法攻擊。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: map window
Casting Cost: 30 mana
Upkeep: none
Fully reveals terrain, terrain specials, cities and armies on all squares in a targeted 'map window.'
zh:
效果：即時
目標：地圖視窗
施法花費：30 法力
維護：無
完全揭示目標「地圖視窗」內所有格子的地形、地形特產、城市與軍隊。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: city
Casting Cost: 75 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Extends the scouting range of a friendly target city to 4 squares in any direction, revealing all lands and all non-invisible enemy troops within that radius.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：城市
施法花費：75 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
將友方目標城市的偵察範圍延伸至各方向4格，揭示該半徑內的所有土地及所有非隱形的敵方部隊。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
Showers a target unit with shards of ice (strength 5 magic cold attack, with every extra point of magic power spent adding a strength of 1 to the attack).
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：單一單位
施法花費：10+ 法力
維護：無
以冰晶碎片轟擊目標單位（強度5的魔法冰冷攻擊，每多花費1點魔力便為攻擊增加1點強度）。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: 4 mana/turn
Summons two giant, poisonous, web-casting spiders.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：200 法力
維護：4 法力/回合
召喚兩隻巨大、有毒、會吐絲結網的蜘蛛。

source:
Effects: Instant Overland
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Alters a target map square,changing deserts, forests, hills and swamps to grasslands; grasslands to forests; volcanoes to mountains; and mountains to hills. Terrain not listed is not a valid target.
zh:
效果：即時大地圖
目標：地圖格
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
改變目標地圖格：將沙漠、森林、丘陵與沼澤變為草原；草原變為森林；火山變為山脈；山脈變為丘陵。未列出的地形不是有效目標。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Endows a target unit (and any units stacked with it) with the ability to travel over all land terrain as if it were traveling over roads (i.e., the cost is only 1/2 movement point per square).
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一單位
施法花費：50 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
賦予目標單位（及與其同格堆疊的所有單位）在所有陸地地形上如同行走於道路般移動的能力（即每格僅耗1/2移動力）。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 275 mana
Upkeep: 8 mana/turn
Summons a cockatrice. The deceptively soft, feathered touch of the cockatrice is capable of turning even the hardiest creatures to stone.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：275 法力
維護：8 法力/回合
召喚一隻雞蛇獸。雞蛇獸柔軟羽翼看似無害的觸碰，卻能將最強悍的生物化為石頭。

source:
Effects: Instant Overland
Target: map special
Casting Cost: 60 mana
Upkeep: none
Transforms coal and ores in hills and mountains: coal to gems, iron to gold and silver to mithril. Transmute will also reverse these transformations gems to coal, gold to iron, and mithril to silver.
zh:
效果：即時大地圖
目標：地圖特產
施法花費：60 法力
維護：無
轉化丘陵與山脈中的煤與礦石：煤變為寶石、鐵變為黃金、白銀變為祕銀。嬗變術也能逆轉這些轉化：寶石變回煤、黃金變回鐵、祕銀變回白銀。

source:
Effects: Instant Overland
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 75 mana
Upkeep: none
Completely heals all units (except for creatures of death) that are stacked in a target land square.
zh:
效果：即時大地圖
目標：地圖格
施法花費：75 法力
維護：無
完全治癒堆疊在目標陸地格上的所有單位（死亡系生物除外）。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 325 mana
Upkeep: 7 mana/turn
Summons a giant basilisk. Basilisks are so frightening to behold that they can turn their enemies to stone simply by gazing in their direction.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：地圖格
施法花費：325 法力
維護：7 法力/回合
召喚一隻巨大的石化蜥。石化蜥的容貌極其駭人，只需朝敵人方向凝視，便能將其化為石頭。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 35/175 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Improves a target unit's defenses (shields) and resistance to Chaos and Nature magic (crosses), by 10 each. These bonuses do not exert cumulative effects with the spell resist elements.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一單位
施法花費：35/175 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
將目標單位的防禦（盾牌）及對混沌與自然魔法的抗性（十字），各提升10點。這些加成與「元素抗性」法術的效果不可累加。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 35 mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to turn an entire enemy unit into stone.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：單一單位
施法花費：35 法力
維護：無
試圖將整個敵方單位化為石頭。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 450 mana
Upkeep: 9 mana/turn
Summons an enormous, wall-crushing stone giant. The massive stone giant is impervious to stoning attacks and can hurl huge boulders at its enemies.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：450 法力
維護：9 法力/回合
召喚一隻能摧牆的巨大石巨人。龐大的石巨人對石化攻擊免疫，並能朝敵人投擲巨石。

source:
Effects: Instant Overland
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: none
Causes the skies above a target map square to rain down a torrent of icy hail. All figures occupying that area are struck with a strength 6 magic cold attack.
zh:
效果：即時大地圖
目標：地圖格
施法花費：200 法力
維護：無
使目標地圖格上方的天空降下傾盆冰雹。佔據該區域的所有個體都遭受強度6的魔法冰冷攻擊。

source:
Effects: Instant Overland
Target: city
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: none
Causes a violent earthquake to shake a target city. All buildings have a 10% chance of being destroyed. All non- flying, corporeal creatures have a 15% chance of dying.
zh:
效果：即時大地圖
目標：城市
施法花費：200 法力
維護：無
使猛烈的地震撼動目標城市。所有建築都有10%的機率被摧毀。所有非飛行的實體生物都有15%的機率死亡。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 600 mana
Upkeep: 15 mana/turn
Summons gorgons. These monstrosities, just as their mythological namesakes, are so ugly and frightening to behold that enemies who mistakenly peek in their direction are turned to stone.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：600 法力
維護：15 法力/回合
召喚蛇髮女妖。這些怪物一如其神話中的同名者，容貌奇醜駭人，誤朝其方向窺視的敵人都會被化為石頭。

source:
Effects: Instant Overland
Target: fortress
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: none
Moves a wizard's enchanted fortress (with summoning circle, if the circle has not previously been moved) to the target friendly city.
zh:
效果：即時大地圖
目標：堡壘
施法花費：200 法力
維護：無
將巫師附魔的堡壘（若召喚法陣先前未曾移動，則連同召喚法陣一併）移至目標友方城市。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: city
Casting Cost: 300 mana
Upkeep: 3 mana/turn
A target city's maximum food harvest increases by 50%. Every turn there is a 10% chance the city's deserts convert to grasslands and volcanoes to verdant hills, and a 20% chance that its corrupted lands return to their pristine state.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：城市
施法花費：300 法力
維護：3 法力/回合
目標城市的最大食物產量提升50%。每回合該城市的沙漠有10%機率轉為草原、火山轉為蒼翠丘陵，並有20%機率使其遭腐化的土地恢復原始純淨狀態。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 60 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons an earth elemental. The creature cannot be summoned if there are already nine friendly units on the battlefield. The wall-crushing earth elemental disappears when the battle is over.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：60 法力
維護：無
召喚一隻土元素。若戰場上已有九個友方單位，則無法召喚此生物。能摧牆的土元素在戰鬥結束後便會消失。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 60/300 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Target unit can regenerate during combat (1 hit point/ turn) and afterwards (immediate return to full health). If the unit dies in combat, it returns in full health if its side won. Spell cannot return a creature that has been banished or unsummoned.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一單位
施法花費：60/300 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
目標單位可在戰鬥中再生（每回合1點生命值），並於戰後即刻恢復至滿血。若該單位在戰鬥中陣亡，只要其陣營獲勝便會以滿血歸來。此法術無法使遭放逐或遣返的生物復歸。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 700 mana
Upkeep: 15 mana/turn
Summons a fierce behemoth. A behemoth is one of the strongest creatures that can be summoned to Arcanus and Myrror.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：700 法力
維護：15 法力/回合
召喚一隻兇猛的比蒙巨獸。比蒙巨獸是能被召喚至阿卡努斯與密羅爾的最強生物之一。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: flying units
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Causes all non-flying, corporeal enemy creatures to lose one movement point per turn. If a creature's movement points are zero, it cannot attack or move the rest of combat; but it can still strike back if attacked.
zh:
效果：戰鬥附魔
目標：飛行單位
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
使所有非飛行的實體敵方生物每回合損失1點移動力。若某生物的移動力歸零，則其在戰鬥剩餘時間內無法攻擊或移動；但若遭攻擊仍可反擊。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: map
Casting Cost: 800 mana
Upkeep: 7 mana/turn
Reveals all lands, cities and non- invisible creatures on both Arcanus and Myrror!
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：地圖
施法花費：800 法力
維護：7 法力/回合
揭示阿卡努斯與密羅爾兩界上所有的土地、城市及非隱形生物！

source:
Effects: Combat
Target: opponent
Casting Cost: 60 mana
Upkeep: none
Calls a powerful electrical storm from which deadly lightning bolts issue. Three to five lightning bolts of strength 8 strike random enemy units at the beginning of every turn until the end of combat.
zh:
效果：戰鬥
目標：對手
施法花費：60 法力
維護：無
召來一場威力強大的雷暴，從中迸發致命的閃電。每回合開始時，三到五道強度8的閃電會擊中隨機的敵方單位，直到戰鬥結束。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 800 mana
Upkeep: 17 mana/turn
Summons an awe-inspiring colossus. A colossus is a rock- wielding fighting machine immune to all known forms of poison and petrification.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：800 法力
維護：17 法力/回合
召喚一尊令人敬畏的巨像。巨像是一台揮舞巨石的戰鬥機器，對所有已知形式的毒素與石化免疫。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: city
Casting Cost: 250 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Creates a teleporting device within a target city. Friendly units can teleport between any two of the casting wizard's cities equipped with earth gates, for the cost of one movement point.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：城市
施法花費：250 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
在目標城市內建立一座傳送裝置。友方單位只需1點移動力，即可在施法巫師任兩座裝有大地之門的城市間傳送。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: all units
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Completely heals all of a wizard's damaged units every game turn.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：所有單位
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
每個遊戲回合完全治癒巫師所有受損的單位。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 20 mana/turn
Summons a gigantic, poisonous, tunneling land wyrm. For all its bulk a great wyrm, with its ability to tunnel underground, is frighteningly fast on the battlefield.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：20 法力/回合
召喚一隻巨大、有毒、會鑽地的陸行蠕龍。巨蠕龍儘管體型龐大，憑藉其鑽入地底的能力，在戰場上的移動速度快得驚人。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1250 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
For every non-combat death or chaos spell cast, all the casting wizard's cities suffer tremors. Each non-flying, corporeal unit has a 10% chance of dying and each building a 5% chance of collapsing.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：1250 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
每當施放一個非戰鬥的死亡或混沌法術，施法巫師的所有城市便會震動。每個非飛行的實體單位有10%機率死亡，每棟建築有5%機率倒塌。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 5/25 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Adds 3 to all resistance rolls versus magic.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一單位
施法花費：5/25 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
所有對抗魔法的抗性檢定+3。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
A stronger version of the arcane Dispel Magic . Every point of mana spent on casting this spell counts as three for the purposes of dispelling the target unit's enchantments.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：不適用
施法花費：10+ 法力
維護：無
秘術「解除魔法」的強化版本。施放此法術所花費的每1點魔力，在解除目標單位附魔時都以三點計算。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Summons an apparently solid cloud to any visible ocean map square of a wizard's choice. This thick body of vapors can carry up to eight units across water and moves at a speed of two map squares/turn.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：50 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
在巫師選定的任一可見海洋地圖格上召喚一團看似堅實的雲。這團濃厚的霧氣可載運至多八個單位渡水，並以每回合兩格地圖格的速度移動。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: friendly unit
Casting Cost: 10/50 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Surrounds the unit with a magically protective wall of air, making the unit almost totally immune to arrow and sling attacks.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：友方單位
施法花費：10/50 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
以一道具魔法防護的氣牆環繞該單位，使其對弓箭與投石攻擊幾乎完全免疫。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 10 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons a group of illusory phantom warriors and binds them to the will of the wizard. The phantoms attack with illusory weapons that completely ignore the effects of armor. When combat ends, the phantom warriors disappear.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：10 法力
維護：無
召喚一群虛幻的幻影戰士，並將其束縛於巫師的意志之下。幻影以虛幻的武器攻擊，完全無視盔甲的防護效果。戰鬥結束時，幻影戰士便會消失。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: enemy unit
Casting Cost: 15 mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to disorient a target unit. A confused unit does not recover (unless disenchanted) until after combat ends. Every turn the confused unit randomly does one of the following: stand around and do nothing, move randomly, attack allies, or attack enemies.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：敵方單位
施法花費：15 法力
維護：無
試圖使目標單位陷入混亂。陷入混亂的單位在戰鬥結束前不會恢復（除非被祛魔）。每回合，混亂的單位會隨機做出下列其中一種行為：原地不動、隨機移動、攻擊友軍，或攻擊敵軍。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
Creates a reserve of counter magic power which resists all spells cast by an opponent wizard as if you had cast an equally-strong dispel magic. Each spell casting attempt by the opposing wizard reduces the strength of the counter magic reserve by five mana.
zh:
效果：戰鬥附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：10+ 法力
維護：無
建立一道反制魔法力量的儲備，能抵抗對手巫師施放的所有法術，效果如同你施放了一道等強度的解除魔法。對方巫師每嘗試施放一次法術，便會使反制魔法儲備的強度減少五點法力。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 100 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Summons a pair of trident-wielding nagas. These swimming creatures spit poison at their foes during combat.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：100 法力
維護：2 法力/回合
召喚一對手持三叉戟的娜迦。這些善泳的生物會在戰鬥中向敵人噴吐毒液。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
Targets a unit with an intensely damaging stream of mental energy. This strength 5 non-physical attack can be increased in strength by one per every two extra mana points spent on the spell.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：單一單位
施法花費：10+ 法力
維護：無
以一道極具破壞力的精神能量流瞄準一個單位。此強度 5 的非物理攻擊，每多花費兩點法力便可使強度增加一點。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 20 mana 
Upkeep: none
Blurs the outline of all friendly units making them more difficult to hit. There is a 10% chance that each point of damage done to the target unit will miss.
zh:
效果：戰鬥附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：20 法力
維護：無
模糊所有友方單位的輪廓，使其更難被命中。對目標單位造成的每一點傷害，都有 10% 的機率落空。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 50+ mana
Upkeep: none
A much stronger version of Disenchant Area, with triple the chance of removing target enchantments (each point of mana spent casting the spell counts as three for the purposes of dispelling a target enchantment).
zh:
效果：即時
目標：地圖格
施法花費：50+ 法力
維護：無
區域祛魔的強化版本，移除目標附魔的機率為三倍（施放此法術所花費的每一點法力，在解除目標附魔時都視為三點）。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: enemy unit
Casting Cost: 25 mana
Upkeep: none
If a targeted unit fails to resist, it suffers a penalty to hit of 2 (i.e., it has a -20% chance to hit) and has more trouble defending than usual (lose 1 shield).
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：敵方單位
施法花費：25 法力
維護：無
若目標單位未能抵抗，便會受到 2 點命中懲罰（即命中機率 -20%），並比平時更難防禦（損失 1 點護盾）。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: friendly unit
Casting Cost: 20/100 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
 Prevents a target unit's positive enchantments from being dispelled. If the target unit is a summoned creature, spell lock also protects the bonds that tie it to the controlling wizard. Spell lock must be dispelled (resistance of 150) before any further enchantments can be removed from the creature or unit.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：友方單位
施法花費：20/100 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
 防止目標單位的正面附魔被解除。若目標單位是召喚生物，法術鎖也會保護將其與控制巫師相繫的束縛。必須先解除法術鎖（抗性 150），才能從該生物或單位身上移除任何進一步的附魔。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: 5 x 5 map area (one full screen)
Casting Cost: 100 mana
Upkeep: none
Makes all roads within two map squares of the targeted area cost no movement points to travel over for non-flying units. Note that all roads on Myrror are automatically enchanted.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：5 x 5 地圖範圍（一整個畫面）
施法花費：100 法力
維護：無
使目標區域兩格地圖範圍內的所有道路，讓非飛行單位通行時不消耗移動力。請注意，米若（Myrror）上的所有道路皆已自動附魔。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 400 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Doubles the speed of all ships and sky masters controlled by a wizard, and halves the speed of all others.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：400 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
使巫師所控制的所有船隻與御空單位速度加倍，並使其他所有單位速度減半。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: yourself
Casting Cost: 400 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Hoodwinks all enemy wizards into liking the casting wizard. Each turn the spell is in effect, relations are shifted by +1 diplomatic point on a scale of -100 to +100.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：自身
施法花費：400 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
蒙騙所有敵方巫師，使其對施法巫師心生好感。法術生效期間，每回合外交關係會在 -100 到 +100 的範圍內提升 +1 點。

source:
Effects: Combat Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 35 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons an illusory phantom beast. A beast only appears if a battle is on land and if there are fewer than nine units already fighting for the wizard. The phantom beast is immune to all forms of death magic and disappears when combat ends.
zh:
效果：戰鬥召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：35 法力
維護：無
召喚一隻虛幻的幻影野獸。只有當戰鬥發生在陸地上，且巫師麾下作戰的單位少於九個時，野獸才會出現。幻影野獸對所有形式的死亡魔法免疫，並在戰鬥結束時消失。

source:
Effects: Instant 
Target: one global enchantment
Casting Cost: 200+ mana
Upkeep: none
Equivalent to a very strong version of the arcane magic Disjunction, with triple the chance of success. Each mana spent on casting this spell counts as three for the purposes of dispelling the target global enchantment.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：單一全域附魔
施法花費：200+ 法力
維護：無
相當於秘術魔法解離術的超強版本，成功機率為三倍。施放此法術所花費的每一點法力，在解除目標全域附魔時都視為三點。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one fantastic unit
Casting Cost: 20+ mana
Upkeep: none
Destroys the magical bond that keeps a fantastic unit with its controlling magician. Each figure within the unit must resist at -3 or be returned whence they were summoned. Every additional 15 mana lowers the targets' resistance by one.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：單一奇幻單位
施法花費：20+ 法力
維護：無
破壞將奇幻單位繫於其控制法師的魔法束縛。單位內的每個個體都必須以 -3 的懲罰進行抵抗，否則便會被遣返回召喚之地。每多花費 15 法力，便可使目標的抗性降低一點。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
 Summons a lightning bolt-wielding storm giant. Storm giants not only hurl vicious lightning bolts over long distances, they also use lightning bolts when fighting hand-to-hand with their enemies.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：500 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
 召喚一個揮舞閃電箭的風暴巨人。風暴巨人不僅能在遠距離投擲兇猛的閃電箭，在與敵人近身搏鬥時也會運用閃電箭。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons an invisible, flying air elemental during battle. The creature disappears when combat ends. Note that a wizard must have fewer than nine units in a battle to summon this creature.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
在戰鬥中召喚一個隱形、會飛的風元素。此生物會在戰鬥結束時消失。請注意，巫師在戰鬥中麾下單位需少於九個才能召喚此生物。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: enemy unit
Casting Cost: 35 mana
Upkeep: none
Causes intense mental anguish to the creature(s) in a target enemy unit. Unable to concentrate, the creatures automatically (with no chance to resist) lose 5 to all of their melee, thrown and ranged attack strengths, defense and resistance. This spell does not effect units that have Immunity to Illusions.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：敵方單位
施法花費：35 法力
維護：無
使目標敵方單位中的生物承受劇烈的精神痛苦。無法集中精神之下，這些生物會自動（毫無抵抗機會）使其所有近戰、投擲與遠程攻擊強度、防禦與抗性皆降低 5 點。此法術對具有幻象免疫的單位無效。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 50/250 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Makes a target unit completely immune to all magic spells and spell-like effects. It also gives the unit immunity to breath and gaze attacks. Finally, the unit is almost completly immune to all magical ranged attacks.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一單位
施法花費：50/250 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
使目標單位完全免疫所有魔法法術與類法術效果。同時也賦予該單位對吐息與凝視攻擊的免疫。最後，該單位幾乎完全免疫所有魔法遠程攻擊。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 650 mana
Upkeep: 17 mana/turn
Summons a djinn. This powerful, flying being can hurl ranged magic attacks at its opponents and is capable of casting up to 20 spell points of sorcery magic during every combat.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：650 法力
維護：17 法力/回合
召喚一個迪精。這個強大、會飛的存在能向對手投擲遠程魔法攻擊，且在每場戰鬥中最多能施放 20 點法術點的巫術魔法。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one fantastic unit
Casting Cost: 70 mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to alter the allegiance of a fantastic (i.e., summoned) creature. If a target creature fails to resist the spell (at a penalty of 2 to its resistance), it is bound to fight for the casting wizard until the end of combat (or until disenchanted). The bound creature disappears after combat ends.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一奇幻單位
施法花費：70 法力
維護：無
試圖改變奇幻（即召喚）生物的歸屬。若目標生物未能抵抗此法術（抗性受到 2 點懲罰），便會被束縛為施法巫師作戰，直到戰鬥結束（或被祛魔為止）。被束縛的生物會在戰鬥結束後消失。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: Global Enchantment
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: as for target enchantment
Steals a global enchantment from another wizard. The stolen global spell becomes the property of the casting wizard in terms of maintenance and control.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：全域附魔
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：比照目標附魔
從另一位巫師處竊取一道全域附魔。被竊取的全域法術在維護與控制上將歸施法巫師所有。

source:
Effects: Fortress Enchantment
Target: wizard's city
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: 25 mana/turn
Suspends a wizard's enchanted fortress far above the earth. Only flying units may enter (or attack) and leave this 'city in the clouds.' The wizard's own foot troops may enter and exit the city overland; during combat, once a foot troop (non-flying unit) leaves the floating city it cannot re-enter until the battle is over.
zh:
效果：堡壘附魔
目標：巫師的城市
施法花費：500 法力
維護：25 法力/回合
將巫師的附魔堡壘懸浮於大地高空之上。只有飛行單位才能進入（或攻擊）並離開這座「雲端之城」。巫師自己的步兵可從陸路進出城市；但在戰鬥中，步兵（非飛行單位）一旦離開浮空城市，便無法在戰鬥結束前重新進入。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 25 mana/turn
Summons a fierce, lightning-breathing wind dragon from the realm of air. The powerful sky drake is immune to magic and illusions. Its lightning breath can easily vaporize most opponents.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：25 法力/回合
從風之領域召喚一頭兇猛、能噴吐閃電的風龍。強大的天空巨龍免疫魔法與幻象。其閃電吐息能輕易將大多數對手汽化。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: missile-armed enemy unit
Casting Cost: 10 mana
Upkeep: none
 Immediately twists and destroys all missile ammunition of a target normal unit, removing that unit's ability to attack at range. There is no way to prevent the effect of this spell.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：配備遠程武器的敵方單位
施法花費：10 法力
維護：無
 立即扭曲並摧毀目標常規單位的所有遠程彈藥，使該單位喪失遠程攻擊能力。無法以任何方式阻止此法術的效果。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: one wall section
Casting Cost: 15 mana
Upkeep: none
Destroys one section of stone wall, clearing a way for troops to pass through.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：單一牆段
施法花費：15 法力
維護：無
摧毀一段石牆，為部隊清出一條通道。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: enemy unit
Casting Cost: 5+ mana
Upkeep: none
Shoots a bolt of intense flames at one figure in a target unit, striking as 5 strength magical fire attack, +1 point of strength per additional mana spent.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：敵方單位
施法花費：5+ 法力
維護：無
向目標單位中的一個個體射出一道烈焰，以強度 5 的魔法火焰攻擊命中，每多花費 1 法力強度便 +1。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 40 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn

Summons and binds a wild pack of fire-breathing hell hounds to the will of the wizard.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：40 法力
維護：1 法力/回合

召喚一群會噴火的野生地獄犬，並將其束縛於巫師的意志之下。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: land map square
Casting Cost: 40 mana
Upkeep: none
Desecrates the target land square. Corrupted lands produce no food or minerals, and can only be restored to production by the prayers of clerics or shamans.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：陸地地圖格
施法花費：40 法力
維護：無
褻瀆目標陸地格。遭腐化的土地不再產出食物或礦物，唯有透過牧師或薩滿的祈禱才能恢復生產。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 15/75 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Imbues the target unit's weapons with a powerful chaotic spirit. These weapons are harder to defend against (an opponent's ability to defend decreases by 10%) and can effectively hit creatures with weapon immunity. Effects are cumulative with Flame Blade.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一常規單位
施法花費：15/75 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
為目標單位的武器灌注強大的混沌之靈。這些武器更難防禦（對手的防禦能力降低 10%），且能有效命中具有武器免疫的生物。效果可與烈焰刃疊加。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 12 mana
Upkeep: none
A target unit receives one resistance roll to ignore Shatter's effects; if it is unsuccessful, all of the unit's melee, thrown, and missile attack strengths decrease to one.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：單一常規單位
施法花費：12 法力
維護：無
目標單位獲得一次抗性檢定以無視碎裂術的效果；若檢定失敗，該單位的所有近戰、投擲與遠程攻擊強度都會降為一。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 18 mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to mutate all creatures within a target unit. Target creatures suffer a penalty of one to their resistance when trying to withstand being warped. Mutated or warped creatures suffer one of the following degenerative changes: half strength attacks, half strength defense, or no magic resistance.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一常規單位
施法花費：18 法力
維護：無
試圖使目標單位內的所有生物突變。目標生物在抵抗扭曲時，抗性會受到一點懲罰。突變或被扭曲的生物會承受下列其中一種退化變化：攻擊強度減半、防禦強度減半，或失去魔法抗性。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 20 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons a fire elemental to do battle for the wizard. Fire elementals have weapon immunity and fire immunity. Once combat ends, the fire elemental returns to the plane of chaos.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：20 法力
維護：無
召喚一個火元素為巫師作戰。火元素具有武器免疫與火焰免疫。戰鬥結束後，火元素便會返回混沌位面。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
Shoots a bolt of intense electricity at the target unit, striking as a strength 5 armor-piercing magical attack, +1 strength per additional mana spent.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：單一單位
施法花費：10+ 法力
維護：無
向目標單位射出一道強烈的電擊，以強度 5 的穿甲魔法攻擊命中，每多花費 1 法力強度便 +1。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 150 mana
Upkeep: 3 mana/turn
Summons a fire giant and binds it to the will of the wizard. Fire giants have fire immunity and can destroy walls.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：150 法力
維護：3 法力/回合
召喚一個火巨人，並將其束縛於巫師的意志之下。火巨人具有火焰免疫，並能摧毀城牆。

source:
Effects: Permanent Unit Enchantment
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Transforms the target into a creature of chaos. Target unit receives one of following mutations: demon-skin armor (+2 defense), demon wings (2 speed flight), or fire-breathing (2 strength fiery breath). Once affected by this spell, the creature can never be Chaos Channeled again.
zh:
效果：永久單位附魔
目標：單一常規單位
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
將目標轉化為混沌生物。目標單位獲得下列其中一種突變：魔皮護甲（防禦 +2）、惡魔之翼（速度 2 的飛行），或噴火能力（強度 2 的火焰吐息）。一旦受此法術影響，該生物便永遠無法再次被混沌通道改造。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 25/125 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Causes the weapons of a target unit to burst into flames, increasing the strength of melee and missile attacks of the unit by 2. Flame Blades also allow units to hit creatures which have weapon immunity, and exerts cumulative effects with Eldritch Weapon.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一常規單位
施法花費：25/125 法力
維護：2 法力/回合
使目標單位的武器燃起火焰，將該單位的近戰與遠程攻擊強度提升 2 點。烈焰刃也讓單位能命中具有武器免疫的生物，並能與邪能武器疊加效果。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Summons flying gargoyles. Gargoyles are extremely difficult to damage, as one might expect flying chunks of masonry to be, and exhibit immunity to stoning and poison attacks.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：200 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
召喚會飛的石像鬼。石像鬼極難被傷害，正如人們對會飛的石塊所預期的那樣，並且免疫石化與毒素攻擊。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 15+ mana
Upkeep: none
Hurls a flying ball of exploding flames at a target unit, striking each figure in the unit with a strength 5 magic fire attack, +1 strength for every additional 3 mana spent.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：單一單位
施法花費：15+ 法力
維護：無
向目標單位投擲一顆飛行的爆裂火球，以強度 5 的魔法火焰攻擊命中單位中的每個個體，每多花費 3 法力強度便 +1。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 300 mana
Upkeep: 8 mana/turn
Summons a doom bat and binds it to the will of the wizard. The doom bat has a fearsome fiery aura which strikes all units it engages with a 4 strength fireball.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：300 法力
維護：8 法力/回合
召喚一隻厄運蝙蝠，並將其束縛於巫師的意志之下。厄運蝙蝠擁有駭人的火焰光環，會以強度 4 的火球擊中所有與它交戰的單位。

source:
Effects: Instant 
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: none
Raises a volcano, destroying any food and minerals provided by a target map square (mountains, hills, and nodes may not be targeted). The volcano provides 1 magic power each turn to the caster. If this spell is cast on a city, each building has a 15 % chance of collapsing.
zh:
效果：即時 
目標：地圖格
施法花費：200 法力
維護：無
隆起一座火山，摧毀目標地圖格所提供的所有食物與礦物（山脈、丘陵與節點無法作為目標）。火山每回合為施法者提供 1 點魔力。若此法術施放於城市，每棟建築有 15 % 的機率倒塌。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 350 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Summons a horrific flying, fire breathing, three-headed chimera.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：350 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
召喚一隻會飛行、噴火、三頭的恐怖奇美拉。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 35 mana
Upkeep: none
Sends a chain of lightning bolts ripping through a target unit. The first bolt of lightning has a strength of 10, the second a strength of 9, and so on until the last bolt delivers a 1 strength attack or the unit is destroyed.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：單一單位
施法花費：35 法力
維護：無
向目標單位射出一連串撕裂而過的連鎖閃電。第一道閃電的強度為 10，第二道為 9，以此類推，直到最後一道造成 1 強度的攻擊，或該單位被消滅為止。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 40 mana
Upkeep: none
Bestows a reduced strength Flame Blade on all normal units, increasing their melee and missile attack strengths by 1 and allowing them to inflict damage on units with Weapon Immunity. This spell is not cumulative with Flame Blade.
zh:
效果：戰鬥附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：40 法力
維護：無
為所有常規單位賦予減弱版的烈焰刃，使其近戰與遠程攻擊強度+1，並使其能對具有武器免疫的單位造成傷害。此法術無法與烈焰刃疊加。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: 12 mana/turn
Summons a chaos spawn and binds it to the will of the wizard. Chaos spawn cause fear in melee, are poisonous, and have Doom, Death and Stoning Gaze attacks.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：500 法力
維護：12 法力/回合
召喚一隻混沌孳生體並將其束縛於巫師的意志之下。混沌孳生體在近戰中引發恐懼、帶有毒性，並擁有厄運、死亡與石化凝視攻擊。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 40 mana
Upkeep: none
Calls forth the awesome power of chaos to strike the target enemy unit for 10 points of damage, regardless of the unit's defenses.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：單一單位
施法花費：40 法力
維護：無
召喚混沌的驚人力量擊向目標敵方單位，無視該單位的防禦造成 10 點傷害。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: map square
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
Vortex moves 3 squares randomly and one controlled by the caster. Any unit in the path of the vortex take 5 hits regardless of defense. In addition, each time the vortex moves, adjacent units may be struck by lightning bolts. A magic vortex does terrible damage to a city that it moves through.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：地圖格
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
漩渦每回合隨機移動 3 格，並由施法者控制移動 1 格。任何位於漩渦行經路徑上的單位無視防禦受到 5 次傷害。此外，漩渦每次移動時，相鄰單位都可能被閃電擊中。魔法漩渦會對其經過的城市造成嚴重破壞。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 550 mana
Upkeep: 15 mana/turn
Summons a fire bolt-throwing, flying efreet and binds it to the will of the wizard. Efreeti are immune to magical fire and have the ability to cast 20 points of Chaos spells each combat.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：550 法力
維護：15 法力/回合
召喚一隻會投擲火焰箭、能飛行的火焰巨靈，並將其束縛於巫師的意志之下。火焰巨靈免疫魔法火焰，並能在每場戰鬥中施放 20 點的混沌系法術。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 60 mana
Upkeep: none
Strikes all enemy units with a 15 strength magical fire attack.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：不適用
施法花費：60 法力
維護：無
以 15 強度的魔法火焰攻擊擊中所有敵方單位。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: enemy city
Casting Cost: 300 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Opens a great magical vortex over an enemy city. Each turn, units inside the city sustain five strength 8 Lightning Bolt attacks, and there is a 5% chance of a building being destroyed.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：敵方城市
施法花費：300 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
在敵方城市上方開啟一道巨大的魔法漩渦。每回合，城內單位會承受五次 8 強度的閃電箭攻擊，並有 5% 的機率摧毀一棟建築。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 650 mana
Upkeep: 14 mana/turn
Summons a nine-headed hydra. Each fire-breathing head on this monstrous creature can regenerate during and after combat.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：650 法力
維護：14 法力/回合
召喚一隻九頭蛇。這隻巨獸的每顆噴火頭顱都能在戰鬥期間與戰鬥後再生。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
If the target has a resistance of less than 10 it is instantly and irrevocably destroyed. There is no method to restore a unit that has been disintegrated.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：單一單位
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
若目標的抗性低於 10，便會立即且無可挽回地被消滅。被瓦解的單位無法以任何方法復原。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 900 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Rains down fiery hail upon both planes, striking all creatures outside cities with a strength 4 magical fire attack. Buildings within cities may also be destroyed (1% chance each turn a building is destroyed). The casting wizard's cities are immune to the effects.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：900 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
在兩個位面上降下熾熱冰雹，以 4 強度的魔法火焰攻擊擊中城市外的所有生物。城內的建築也可能被摧毀（每回合有 1% 機率摧毀一棟建築）。施法巫師的城市不受影響。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 20 mana/turn
Once this enchantment has been cast, the entire world begins to slowly be corrupted. Each turn 3-6 map squares are withered as per the spell Corruption. The caster's cities and surrounding areas are, of course, exempt.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：20 法力/回合
一旦施放此附魔，整個世界便開始緩慢地被腐蝕。每回合有 3-6 個地圖格如同腐化術一般枯萎。施法者的城市與周邊地區當然不受影響。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 40 mana/turn
All creatures of chaos have 2 added to their hand-to-hand, missile, fire-breath, and magic attacks
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：40 法力/回合
所有混沌生物的近戰、遠程、噴火與魔法攻擊皆+2

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1100 mana
Upkeep: 15 mana /turn
All newly created normal units controlled by the casting wizard are mutated by the effects of chaos, the same as if Chaos Channels had been cast on them.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：1100 法力
維護：15 法力/回合
所有由施法巫師控制的新建常規單位都會被混沌的力量變異，效果如同對其施放了混沌通道一般。

source:
Effects: Creature Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 900 mana
Upkeep: 30 mana/turn
Summons an avenging fire-breathing dragon from the depths of chaos. The flames spewing from a great drake's jaws are so hot that weak opponents may be incinerated before ever getting a chance to fight back.
zh:
效果：生物召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：900 法力
維護：30 法力/回合
從混沌的深處召喚一隻復仇的噴火巨龍。偉大巨龍口中噴出的火焰極為熾熱，孱弱的對手可能在有機會反擊之前就被焚為灰燼。

source:
Effects: Instant 
Target: enemy city
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: none
Every building in the target city has a 50% chance to be destroyed, and each unit inside the city takes 10 points of damage regardless of defense. The amount of pure chaos being released also corrupts the surrounding area.
zh:
效果：即時 
目標：敵方城市
施法花費：500 法力
維護：無
目標城市的每棟建築都有 50% 的機率被摧毀，城內每個單位無視防禦受到 10 點傷害。釋放出的純粹混沌之力也會腐蝕周邊地區。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1250 mana
Upkeep: 40 mana/turn
 Begins to destroy the entire world, as volcano after volcano rises, ravaging the lands of both worlds. Like Raise Volcano, the casting wizard gains one point of power from each new volcano created.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：1250 法力
維護：40 法力/回合
 開始摧毀整個世界，一座座火山接連隆起，蹂躪兩個世界的土地。如同隆起火山，施法巫師每創造一座新火山便獲得 1 點魔力。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 8/40 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Adds 3 to the target unit's defense and resistance against all death or chaos related spells or monster attacks.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一單位
施法花費：8/40 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
使目標單位對所有死亡或混沌相關的法術或怪物攻擊的防禦與抗性+3。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 150 mana
Upkeep: 3 mana/turn
Increases the fame of the casting wizard by 10 in addition to any other bonuses as long as the spell is in effect.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：150 法力
維護：3 法力/回合
在法術生效期間，除其他加成外，使施法巫師的聲望+10。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 80 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Summons a Guardian Spirit which can meld with a node to focus its power and direct it to the controlling wizard. A melded node radiates a magic aura the color of the wizard's banner.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：80 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
召喚一隻守護靈，它能與節點融合以聚集其力量並導引給控制的巫師。已融合的節點會散發出巫師旗幟顏色的魔法光環。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 20/100 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
 Endows a target unit with the gift of Immunity to Illusions and allows the unit to see through Wall of Darkness.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一單位
施法花費：20/100 法力
維護：2 法力/回合
 賦予目標單位幻象免疫的天賦，並使其能看穿黑暗之牆。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: one map square
Casting Cost: 125 mana
Upkeep: none
All friendly units within the target map square are transported to the other plane of existence. If the unit is transported to an area which cannot normally entered by movement or into combat, the spell fails.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：單一地圖格
施法花費：125 法力
維護：無
目標地圖格內的所有友方單位被傳送至另一個存在位面。若單位被傳送至正常移動或戰鬥無法進入的區域，此法術失敗。

source:
Effects: Instant 
Target: one dead hero
Casting Cost: 250 mana
Upkeep: none
Resurrects a hero from the dead, regardless of the length of time he or she has been dead. The hero reappears at the wizard's summoning circle and is fully healed. If six other heros have already been hired the spell fails.
zh:
效果：即時 
目標：單一陣亡英雄
施法花費：250 法力
維護：無
使一名英雄死而復生，無論其死亡時間多久。該英雄會在巫師的召喚法陣重新出現並完全恢復。若已雇用其他六名英雄，此法術失敗。

source:
Effects: Creature Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 250 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
 Calls a herd of magic unicorns. These lovely creatures can teleport to any location on the battlefield and inspire their allies to with an increased ability to resist the effects of negative spells.
zh:
效果：生物召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：250 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
 召喚一群魔法獨角獸。這些美麗的生物能傳送到戰場上的任何位置，並鼓舞盟友，提升其抵抗負面法術效果的能力。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one dead normal unit
Casting Cost: 35 mana
Upkeep: none
Raises a fallen unit from the dead. The unit returns with half its normal creatures. All enchantments cast on the unit are lost. The spell does not work on fantastic creatures, since they go back to their home world when slain.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：單一陣亡常規單位
施法花費：35 法力
維護：無
使一個陣亡單位死而復生。該單位返回時兵員數量減半。施放在該單位上的所有附魔皆消失。此法術對奇幻生物無效，因為牠們被殺死後會回到自己的母世界。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 150 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Calls forth the light of the heavens to shower the city in holy light. Any combat taking place within the area of the city is treated as if True Light was in effect.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：友方城市
施法花費：150 法力
維護：2 法力/回合
召喚天堂之光灑落城市，使其沐浴於聖光之中。任何發生在城市範圍內的戰鬥都視為真光術生效。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 40/200 mana
Upkeep: 4 mana/turn
Adds 3 to the target unit's attack strength, hits, and resistance.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一單位
施法花費：40/200 法力
維護：4 法力/回合
使目標單位的攻擊強度、生命值與抗性+3。

source:
Effects: Hero Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: 12 mana/turn
Summons Torin the Chosen to aid your cause. There is only one Chosen for each wizard. If he is killed or disbanded and summoned again he retains all experience from his previous incarnations.
zh:
效果：英雄召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：500 法力
維護：12 法力/回合
召喚被選中者托林（Torin the Chosen）助你一臂之力。每位巫師只有一位被選中者。若他被殺死或解散後再次被召喚，他會保留先前所有化身的經驗。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one friendly unit
Casting Cost: 40/200 mana
Maintenance: 5 mana/turn
Target unit is resistant to damage from non-magical attacks, and the first two hits sustained by the unit from any attack are ignored.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一友方單位
施法花費：40/200 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
目標單位對非魔法攻擊的傷害具有抗性，且該單位受到任何攻擊時，最初兩次命中會被忽略。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 40/200 mana
Maintenance: 2 mana/turn
Gives a target unit a tremendous sense of holy purpose, which calls so strongly upon the forces of life that they manifest themselves in the unit, providing it with complete immunity to all death and chaos magic spells and spell effects.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：單一單位
施法花費：40/200 法力
維護：2 法力/回合
賦予目標單位強烈的神聖使命感，這份使命強烈召喚生命之力，使其顯現於該單位之中，提供其對所有死亡與混沌魔法法術及法術效果的完全免疫。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 250 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Increases the gold obtained from the target city by 50% as long as the enchantment is in effect.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：友方城市
施法花費：250 法力
維護：2 法力/回合
在附魔生效期間，使目標城市獲得的金幣+50%。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Casting Cost: 550 mana
Upkeep: 15 mana/turn
Summons an angel. Angels enhance the fighting ability of friendly units and their touch Dispels Evil.
zh:
效果：召喚
施法花費：550 法力
維護：15 法力/回合
召喚一位天使。天使能增強友方單位的戰鬥能力，其觸碰能驅邪。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: none
 Heals all friendly units for 5 hit points (or less, if a unit has sustained fewer than 5 hit points of damage).
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：不適用
施法花費：50 法力
維護：無
 為所有友方單位恢復 5 點生命值（若單位受到的傷害不足 5 點，則恢復較少）。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 60 mana
Upkeep: none
 Calls upon the forces of holiness and light to make all friendly units fight and defend exceptionally well; attack strengths (swords), ability to hit, and defense (shields) all increase by 2, while resistance (crosses) increases by 3 and the ability to block an attack and to hit increases by 10%.
zh:
效果：戰鬥附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：60 法力
維護：無
 召喚神聖與光明之力，使所有友方單位的戰鬥與防禦表現格外出色；攻擊強度（劍）、命中能力與防禦（盾）皆+2，抗性（十字）+3，格擋攻擊與命中的能力+10%。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 350 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
 Instills a sense of greater purpose into the local citizenry; that city's production rate rises by 50%.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：友方城市
施法花費：350 法力
維護：2 法力/回合
 為當地市民注入更崇高的使命感；該城市的生產速率提升 50%。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 900 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
All normal units' weapons are blessed with a +1 attack bonus and can strike creatures immune to non- magical attacks.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：900 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
所有常規單位的武器都獲得+1 攻擊加成的祝福，並能擊中免疫非魔法攻擊的生物。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 400 mana
Upkeep: 8 mana/turn
 Dispels all negative enchantments on a city and protects the city from further chaos and death enchantments (whether city-specific or global).
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：友方城市
施法花費：400 法力
維護：8 法力/回合
 解除城市上的所有負面附魔，並保護城市免受後續的混沌與死亡附魔（無論是城市專屬或全域的）。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
All non-combat death spells cast must resist against Life Force as if a Dispel Magic of 500 strength had been cast.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
所有施放的非戰鬥死亡法術都必須對抗生命力，如同受到 500 強度的解除魔法一般。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
Tries to prevent all chaos magic spells, requiring them to resist the forces of life as if a strong Disjunction--strength 500--had just been cast.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
試圖阻止所有混沌魔法法術，迫使它們抵抗生命之力，效果如同剛施放了一道強力解離術——強度 500。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1100 mana
Upkeep: 10 mana/turn
 Inspires all of a wizard's normal units so that their levels all raise by one (recruit become regulars, regulars become veterans, etc.).
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：1100 法力
維護：10 法力/回合
 鼓舞巫師所有的常規單位，使其等級全部提升一級（新兵變正規兵，正規兵變老兵，以此類推）。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 950 mana
Upkeep: 20 mana/turn
Summons an archangel. Archangels are immune to illusions, inspire friendly units to fight better than normal and can cast up to 40 mana in life magic spells every battle.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：950 法力
維護：20 法力/回合
召喚一名大天使。大天使免疫幻象，能鼓舞友方單位戰鬥表現優於平常，且每場戰鬥可施放至多 40 法力的生命魔法法術。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 25 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Summons a group of 6 skeletons and binds them to the will of the wizard. Skeletons have missile immunity.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：25 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
召喚一群 6 隻骷髏並將其束縛於巫師的意志之下。骷髏具有遠程攻擊免疫。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: enemy unit
Casting Cost: 5 mana
Upkeep: none
Saps the strength from a target unit's creatures, who suffer a penalty of 2 to their melee, thrown and ranged attack strengths, unless the unit resists the spell at a -2 penalty.
zh:
效果：戰鬥附魔
目標：敵方單位
施法花費：5 法力
維護：無
汲取目標單位生物的力量，使其近戰、投擲與遠程攻擊強度遭受 2 點減益，除非該單位以 -2 減值抵抗此法術。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 30 mana
Upkeep: none
 Generates a frenzy of sacrificing to the gods of death, which doubles the magic power obtained from shrines, temples, parthenons and cathedrals. However, the rituals reduce the city population growth by 25% and increase the level of unrest by one.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：友方城市
施法花費：30 法力
維護：無
 掀起一場向死亡諸神獻祭的狂熱，使來自神龕、神殿、帕德嫩神廟與大教堂的魔力加倍。然而，這些儀式使城市人口成長降低 25%，並使動亂等級提升一級。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: enemy unit
Casting Cost: 15 mana
Upkeep: none
If the target unit fails to resist at -2, all creatures within are thrust into a deep sleep. The unit is unable to take any actions and any attacks on the unit automatically do maximum damage.
zh:
效果：戰鬥附魔
目標：敵方單位
施法花費：15 法力
維護：無
若目標單位未能以 -2 減值抵抗，其中所有生物將陷入深沉的睡眠。該單位無法採取任何行動，且對其發動的任何攻擊都自動造成最大傷害。

source:
Effects: Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 80 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Summons a pack of ghouls and binds them to the will of the wizard. Any units slain mostly by the ghouls arise after the battle to serve the wizard in his undead army.
zh:
效果：召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：80 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
召喚一群食屍鬼並將其束縛於巫師的意志之下。任何主要被食屍鬼殺死的單位，將在戰鬥後復起，加入巫師的不死大軍效命。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: enemy unit
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
Siphons life from a target unit and gives it to a spell caster hero or converts the drained life into mana for a spell caster wizard. Additional mana makes the spell harder to resist. Units destroyed mainly by Life Drain become Undead under the caster's control.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：敵方單位
施法花費：10+ 法力
維護：無
從目標單位汲取生命，並將其賦予施法的英雄，或為施法的巫師將汲取的生命轉換為法力。額外的法力使此法術更難以抵抗。主要被生命汲取摧毀的單位將成為不死生物，受施法者控制。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: enemy wizard
Casting Cost: 20 mana
Upkeep: none
All enemy spell casters are drained 5 mana each combat turn. This includes the opponent wizard you are currently battling. Additionally, all units with magical ranged attacks lose one spell shot each turn.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：敵方巫師
施法花費：20 法力
維護：無
所有敵方施法者每個戰鬥回合被汲取 5 法力，包括你目前正在交戰的對手巫師。此外，所有具備魔法遠程攻擊的單位每回合損失一次法術射擊。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 30 mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to change the allegiance of a normal enemy unit to that of the casting wizard. If the target unit becomes possessed, it fights for the casting wizard until combat ends. Note that fantastic creatures and heroes may not be possessed.
zh:
效果：戰鬥附魔
目標：一個常規單位
施法花費：30 法力
維護：無
試圖將一個常規敵方單位的效忠對象轉變為施法巫師。若目標單位被附身，它將為施法巫師戰鬥直到戰鬥結束。請注意，奇幻生物與英雄無法被附身。

source:
Effects: Permanent Unit Enchantment
Target: one normal unit
Casting Cost: 180 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
'Curses' a normal unit with the effects of lycanthropy, changing them into werewolves with the ability to regenerate and weapon immunity.
zh:
效果：永久單位附魔
目標：一個常規單位
施法花費：180 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
以狼化的效果「詛咒」一個常規單位，將其變為具有再生能力與武器免疫的狼人。

source:
Effects: Unit Enchantment
Target: normal unit
Casting Cost: 100 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Transforms a target creature into a vile undead being with +2 melee attack strength, +1 to missile attack strength, breath attacks, hit points, resistance and defense. Undead can not be healed or animated, but gain all the immunities of Death creatures.
zh:
效果：單位附魔
目標：常規單位
施法花費：100 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
將目標生物轉化為邪惡的不死存在，近戰攻擊強度 +2，遠程攻擊強度、噴吐攻擊、生命值、抗性與防禦各 +1。不死生物無法被治療或喚醒，但獲得死亡屬性生物的所有免疫能力。

source:
Effects: Creature Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 250 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Summons a night stalker and binds it to the will of the wizard. Night Stalkers are invisible, non- corporeal, and have the dreaded death gaze.
zh:
效果：生物召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：250 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
召喚一名夜行獵者並將其束縛於巫師的意志之下。夜行獵者隱形、非實體，並擁有令人膽寒的死亡凝視。

source:
Effects: Combat/City Enchantment
Target: one city
Casting Cost: 40 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana / turn
No enemy unit outside a Wall of Darkness may attack a friendly unit inside with a ranged attack, unless the enemy unit has illusions immunity.
zh:
效果：戰鬥/城市附魔
目標：一座城市
施法花費：40 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
位於黑暗之牆外的敵方單位無法以遠程攻擊攻擊牆內的友方單位，除非該敵方單位具有幻象免疫。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 30 mana
Upkeep: none
The target unit's melee attack strength is doubled and its defense is reduced to 0.
zh:
效果：戰鬥附魔
目標：一個單位
施法花費：30 法力
維護：無
目標單位的近戰攻擊強度加倍，防禦降為 0。

source:
Effects: Creature Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 325 mana
Upkeep: 7 mana/turn
Summons a group of 4 shadow demons and binds them to the will of the wizard. Shadow demons can plane shift and regenerate.
zh:
效果：生物召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：325 法力
維護：7 法力/回合
召喚一群 4 隻暗影惡魔並將其束縛於巫師的意志之下。暗影惡魔能夠位面轉移與再生。

source:
Effects: Combat/Unit Enchantment
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 30 / 150 mana
Upkeep: 3 man/turn
Target unit becomes non-corporeal. Non- corporeal units gain weapon immunity and the ability to move across any terrain at a cost of 1/2 movement point.
zh:
效果：戰鬥/單位附魔
目標：一個單位
施法花費：30 / 150 法力
維護：3 法力/回合
目標單位變為非實體。非實體單位獲得武器免疫，並能以 1/2 移動點數的代價穿越任何地形。

source:
Effects: Combat Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 40 mana
Upkeep: none
Wracks all enemy non-death creatures with the powers of darkness. Each figure in every enemy unit must resist with a +1 bonus or take 1 point of damage.
zh:
效果：戰鬥附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：40 法力
維護：無
以黑暗之力摧殘所有非死亡屬性的敵方生物。每個敵方單位中的每個個體都必須以 +1 加值抵抗，否則承受 1 點傷害。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: enemy city
Casting Cost: 100 mana
Upkeep: 4 mana/turn
A demonic presence enters the target city, destroying any magic power generated by shrines, temples, parthenons, and cathedrals. The spell has no effect if the city's owner can use death magic.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：敵方城市
施法花費：100 法力
維護：4 法力/回合
一股惡魔的存在進入目標城市，摧毀由神龕、神殿、帕德嫩神廟與大教堂產生的所有魔力。若城市擁有者能使用死亡魔法，則此法術無效。

source:
Effects: Creature Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 500 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Summons a group of 4 wraiths and binds them to the will of the wizard. Wraiths are non-corporeal and have a -3 resistance life-stealing attack.
zh:
效果：生物召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：500 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
召喚一群 4 隻幽魂並將其束縛於巫師的意志之下。幽魂為非實體，並擁有 -3 抗性的竊命攻擊。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: friendly city
Casting Cost: 150 mana
Upkeep: 3 mana/turn
Summons a great cloud of shadow which surrounds the city as long as the enchantment is in effect. All combats taking place at the city are treated as though a Darkness spell has been cast.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：友方城市
施法花費：150 法力
維護：3 法力/回合
召喚一片巨大的暗影之雲環繞城市，只要附魔持續生效即不散去。在該城市發生的所有戰鬥都視同已施放黑暗術。

source:
Effects: Overland Enchantment
Target: owned magic node
Casting Cost: 75 mana
Upkeep: none
Corrupts the targeted magic node, cursing the controller and drawing out 5 mana from the wizard instead of generating more. Once warped, a node can only be returned to normal by a Disenchant Area or Disenchant True spell. Until then the node will continue to draw out magical power.
zh:
效果：陸上附魔
目標：擁有的魔法節點
施法花費：75 法力
維護：無
腐化目標魔法節點，詛咒其控制者，並從巫師處抽走 5 法力，而非產生更多法力。一旦被扭曲，節點只能透過區域祛魔或真實祛魔法術恢復正常。在此之前，節點將持續抽走魔力。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 800 mana
Upkeep: 40 mana/turn
All normal creatures falling in battle become zombies at the end of the battle under the control of the casting wizard if that wizard is victorious.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：800 法力
維護：40 法力/回合
若施法巫師獲勝，所有在戰鬥中倒下的常規生物將在戰鬥結束時成為殭屍，受施法巫師控制。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: enemy city
Casting Cost: 200 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Halves the food production of the afflicted city as long as the famine is in effect. If the city has an insufficient food supply, the citizens will begin to starve.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：敵方城市
施法花費：200 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
只要饑荒持續生效，受影響城市的食物產量減半。若城市食物供應不足，市民將開始挨餓。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: enemy city
Casting Cost: 150 mana
Upkeep: 2 mana/turn
Halves the production of a city.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：敵方城市
施法花費：150 法力
維護：2 法力/回合
使城市的生產減半。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: one unit
Casting Cost: 40 mana
Upkeep: none
Each figure in one unit must save at -5 or be slain instantly.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：一個單位
施法花費：40 法力
維護：無
一個單位中的每個個體都必須以 -5 通過豁免，否則立即被殺死。

source:
Effects: Creature Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 600 mana
Upkeep: 8 mana / turn
Summons a group of 4 death knights and binds them to the will of the wizard. Death knights attack with +2 to-hit, armor piercing and first strike. They also have a -4 resistance life-stealing attack.
zh:
效果：生物召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：600 法力
維護：8 法力/回合
召喚一群 4 名死亡騎士並將其束縛於巫師的意志之下。死亡騎士攻擊時具有 +2 命中、破甲與先制。他們亦擁有 -4 抗性的竊命攻擊。

source:
Effects: Permanent Creature Enchantment
Target: one dead unit
Casting Cost: 50 mana
Upkeep: Special
Raises one slain enemy (not protected by magic immunity) or ally unit from the dead and places it under your control. The creature becomes undead, and is treated as a creature of death for all purposes. Animated fantastic units cost 50% more in maintenance.
zh:
效果：永久生物附魔
目標：一個死亡單位
施法花費：50 法力
維護：特殊
將一個被殺死的敵方（未受魔法免疫保護）或友方單位從死亡中復起，並置於你的控制之下。該生物成為不死生物，並在所有情況下視為死亡屬性生物。被喚醒的奇幻單位維護費用增加 50%。

source:
Effects: City Enchantment
Target: enemy city
Casting Cost: 350 mana
Upkeep: 5 mana/turn
Spreads a deadly plague throughout the affected city killing one population each turn if the current population exceeds a 1-10 roll.
zh:
效果：城市附魔
目標：敵方城市
施法花費：350 法力
維護：5 法力/回合
在受影響城市中散播致命瘟疫，若當前人口超過一次 1-10 的擲骰結果，每回合殺死一名人口。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 15 mana/turn
Covers the world in a blanket of darkness. Except for those cities protected by Heavenly Light, all combats are assumed to be covered by the spell of Darkness.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：15 法力/回合
以一層黑暗覆蓋整個世界。除了受天堂之光保護的城市外，所有戰鬥都視為籠罩在黑暗術之下。

source:
Effects: Creature Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 1000 mana
Upkeep: 15 mana/turn
Summons a demon lord and binds it to the will of the wizard. Demon lords can summon up to 3 lesser demons per combat, have weapon immunity, and have a -1 resistance life-stealing attack both in melee and at range.
zh:
效果：生物召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：1000 法力
維護：15 法力/回合
召喚一名惡魔領主並將其束縛於巫師的意志之下。惡魔領主每場戰鬥可召喚至多 3 隻次級惡魔，具有武器免疫，並在近戰與遠程皆擁有 -1 抗性的竊命攻擊。

source:
Effects: Creature Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 30 mana
Upkeep: 1 mana/turn
Summons a magic spirit which can meld with magical nodes and direct the node's power to the controlling wizard.
zh:
效果：生物召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：30 法力
維護：1 法力/回合
召喚一個魔法精靈，它能與魔法節點融合，並將節點的力量導向控制它的巫師。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat
Target: single unit
Casting Cost: 10+ mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to destroy all enemy enchantments on a unit. The chance for success is equal to the mana spent on this spell divided by the sum of the costs for this spell and the target enchantment. For example if this spell is cast with 30 mana on a unit with an Eldritch Weapon enchantment (cost 15) the chance to dispel it would be 30/(30+15) or 67%.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥
目標：單一單位
施法花費：10+ 法力
維護：無
試圖摧毀一個單位上所有的敵方附魔。成功的機率等於施放此法術所花的法力，除以此法術花費與目標附魔花費的總和。例如，若以 30 法力對一個帶有邪能武器附魔（花費 15）的單位施放此法術，解除它的機率為 30/(30+15) 即 67%。

source:
Effects: Instant Combat/Global
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 50+ mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to dispel all enemy spells in the targeted map square. The chance of successfully dispelling an enchantment is calculated as in Dispel Magic.
zh:
效果：即時戰鬥/全域
目標：不適用
施法花費：50+ 法力
維護：無
試圖解除目標地圖格中所有的敵方法術。成功解除一項附魔的機率計算方式與解除魔法相同。

source:
Effects:Permanent Item Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: special
Upkeep: none
Creates a lesser magical item for use by your heroes. Only powers that cost 200 mana or less may be used. For details, see magic item creation in your manual.
zh:
效果：永久物品附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：特殊
維護：無
製造一件較次級的魔法物品供你的英雄使用。只能使用花費 200 法力以下的能力。詳情請參閱手冊中的魔法物品製造章節。

source:
Effects:Creature Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 300 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons a lesser hero to lead your army. The hero will not require any initial gold to join, but still requires maintenance. This spell will fail if you already control six heroes.
zh:
效果：生物召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：300 法力
維護：無
召喚一名較次級的英雄來統領你的軍隊。該英雄加入時不需任何初始金幣，但仍需維護費用。若你已控制六名英雄，此法術將失敗。

source:
Effects: Instant
Target: one Global Enchantment
Casting Cost: 200+ mana
Upkeep: none
Attempts to dispel one enemy global enchantment. The chance of successfully dispelling this enchantment is calculated as in Dispel Magic.
zh:
效果：即時
目標：一項全域附魔
施法花費：200+ 法力
維護：無
試圖解除一項敵方全域附魔。成功解除此附魔的機率計算方式與解除魔法相同。

source:
Effects: Permanent Item Enchantment
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: special
Upkeep: none
Creates a magical artifact for use by your heroes. Any powers may be used. For details, see magic item creation in your manual.
zh:
效果：永久物品附魔
目標：不適用
施法花費：特殊
維護：無
製造一件魔法神器供你的英雄使用。可使用任何能力。詳情請參閱手冊中的魔法物品製造章節。

source:
Effects: Creature Summoning
Target: n/a
Casting Cost: 750 mana
Upkeep: none
Summons a greater hero to lead your army. The hero will not require any initial gold to join,but still requires maintenance. This spell will fail if you already control six heroes.
zh:
效果：生物召喚
目標：不適用
施法花費：750 法力
維護：無
召喚一名較強大的英雄來統領你的軍隊。該英雄加入時不需任何初始金幣，但仍需維護費用。若你已控制六名英雄，此法術將失敗。

source: The purify button allows you to clean up corrupted areas of the world. It takes three turns to completely purify each area.
zh: 淨化按鈕讓你清理世界中受腐化的區域。完全淨化每塊區域需要三回合。

source: Dark elf grow very slowly (-20 people/turn) and may not build Cathedrals or Maritime Guilds.
zh: 黑暗精靈成長非常緩慢（每回合人口-20），且無法建造大教堂或海事公會。

source: This is the name and size of the city.
zh: 這是城市的名稱與規模。

source: If you are transmuting gold to power, this is the amount of gold you wish to convert. If you are transmuting power to gold, this is the amount of gold that you will receive for the given amount of power.
zh: 若你正在將金幣嬗變為魔力，這是你想轉換的金幣數量。若你正在將魔力嬗變為金幣，這是你以給定魔力換得的金幣數量。

source: By sliding this back and forth, you affect the amount gold and power involved.
zh: 來回滑動此處，即可調整所涉及的金幣與魔力數量。

source: If you are transmuting power to gold, this is the amount of power you wish to convert. If you are transmuting gold to power, this is the amount of power that you will receive for the given amount of gold.
zh: 若你正在將魔力嬗變為金幣，這是你想轉換的魔力數量。若你正在將金幣嬗變為魔力，這是你以給定金幣換得的魔力數量。

source: The arrow button toggles between transmuting gold to power and power to gold.
zh: 箭頭按鈕可在「金幣嬗變為魔力」與「魔力嬗變為金幣」之間切換。

source: Large shields add +2 to the unit's defense against all ranged attacks.
zh: 大型盾牌使該單位對所有遠程攻擊的防禦+2。

source: Plane shift allows the unit to shift back and forth between the planes at will.
zh: 位面轉移讓該單位能隨意在各位面之間來回轉移。

source: Wall crusher allows the unit to destroy a section of a stone wall 50% of the time.
zh: 破牆能力讓該單位有50%的機率摧毀一段石牆。

source: Healers will heal 25% of the damage that all units stacked with the healer have sustained after a combat.
zh: 治療者會在戰鬥結束後，治癒與其同格的所有單位所受傷害的25%。

source: Invisibility makes the unit susceptible only to ranged attacks when adjacent to an enemy, and otherwise reduces the attacker's chance to hit by 1.
zh: 隱形使該單位在與敵方相鄰時僅會受到遠程攻擊，其餘情況下則使攻擊者的命中機率-1。

source: Create undead allows the unit to create new undead of the same type from any units that it has eliminated in combat. This cannot be used on heroes.
zh: 創造不死讓該單位能將其在戰鬥中消滅的任何單位，化為同類型的新不死生物。此能力無法用於英雄。

source: Non-corporeal allows the unit to pass through any land square at a cost of 1/2 movement point, and allows it to move through walls unimpeded.
zh: 非實體讓該單位能以1/2移動力的代價通過任何陸地格，並可暢行無阻地穿越牆壁。

source: Wind walking allows the unit and all stacked with it to fly.
zh: 御風行讓該單位及與其同格的所有單位皆可飛行。

source: Regeneration allows the unit to heal one hit per combat phase, and be completely healed at the end of a combat. If the unit was destroyed but its side was victorious, the unit will come back to life, completely healed.
zh: 再生讓該單位每個戰鬥階段治癒一點傷害，並在戰鬥結束時完全治癒。若該單位被消滅但其陣營獲勝，該單位將復活並完全治癒。

source: Purify allows a unit to clean corruption from a square.
zh: 淨化讓單位能清除一個格子上的腐化。

source: Fire immunity makes units immune to fire attacks.
zh: 火焰免疫使單位免疫火焰攻擊。

source: Weapon immunity makes the unit nearly impervious to attacks from normal units that do not have mithril, adamantium, blessed, or flaming weapons, and increases the unit's defense to 10 against magical attacks. Weapon immunity does not protect against fantastic creatures and spells.
zh: 武器免疫使該單位幾乎不受未持有秘銀、精金、受祝福或燃焰武器之常規單位的攻擊影響，並將該單位對魔法攻擊的防禦提升至10。武器免疫無法抵禦奇幻生物與法術。

source: Missiles immunity makes the unit immune to all forms of missile attacks.
zh: 飛彈免疫使該單位免疫所有形式的飛彈攻擊。

source: Illusions immunity negates the illusionary bonus of illusionary attacks and makes the unit impervious to illusion-resistance spells. In addition, the unit can see invisible units.
zh: 幻象免疫可抵消幻象攻擊的幻象加成，並使該單位不受幻象抗性法術影響。此外，該單位能看見隱形單位。

source: Cold immunity makes the unit impervious to cold attacks.
zh: 寒冷免疫使該單位不受寒冷攻擊影響。

source: Magic immunity makes a unit immune to all forms of magic including ranged magical attacks and all spell effects, regardless of realm.
zh: 魔法免疫使單位免疫所有形式的魔法，包括遠程魔法攻擊與所有法術效果，無論屬於何種領域。

source: Death immunity negates all spells which cause death and fear.
zh: 死亡免疫可抵消所有造成死亡與恐懼的法術。

source: Heals a target unit by 5 hit points (or less, if the unit has sustained fewer than 5 hit points of damage).
zh: 治癒目標單位5點生命值（若該單位所受傷害不足5點，則治癒量較少）。

source: Throws a giant exploding ball of flames at all the figures in a target unit. The intensity of the flames' heat and the amount of damage inflicted by this mini-inferno depends on the amount of magic power pumped into the spell. A fireball has a base strength of 5; the strength increases by one for every 3 additional units of mana added.
zh: 向目標單位中的所有個體投擲一顆爆裂的巨大火球。這團小型烈焰的熱度與造成的傷害量，取決於灌注進此法術的魔力多寡。火球的基礎強度為5；每額外加入3單位法力，強度便提升1。

source: Calls upon the forces of chaos to viciously tear into the target unit, causing ten points of damage regardless of defenses.
zh: 召喚混沌之力凶狠地撕裂目標單位，無視防禦造成十點傷害。

source: Each individual enemy unit engaging the fearful in melee must resist magic or stand frozen in terror, unable to attack, even if swung upon.
zh: 每個與帶有恐懼者進行近戰的敵方單位都必須抵抗魔法，否則將因恐懼而僵立原地、無法攻擊，即使遭到攻擊也是如此。

source: Casts a sticky web over the creatures in a target unit. Creatures stuck in this web may not move until they have destroyed the web. The web has a total of 12 'hit points' (hearts, but no defenses) and can only be destroyed by the trapped unit's melee and magic ranged attacks, both of which do their full force in damage against webs. The sticky remnants of the web prevent flying units that were trapped from flying for the remainder of the battle.
zh: 向目標單位中的生物投出黏網。被困在網中的生物在摧毀網之前無法移動。此網共有12點「生命值」（有心數，但無防禦），且只能由受困單位的近戰與魔法遠程攻擊摧毀，這兩種攻擊對網均以全力造成傷害。網的黏性殘餘會使受困的飛行單位在該場戰鬥剩餘時間內無法飛行。

source: Resistance to all increases the resistance of all friendly units in the combat by the listed bonus level. The bonus is not cumulative with other creatures with the same ability.
zh: 全抗性使戰鬥中所有友方單位的抗性提升所列的加成等級。此加成不與其他具有相同能力的生物疊加。

source: Holy bonus increases the attack strength, defense, and resistance of all friendly units in the combat by the bonus level of the holy bonus. The bonus is not cumulative.
zh: 神聖加成使戰鬥中所有友方單位的攻擊強度、防禦與抗性提升神聖加成的等級。此加成不可疊加。

source: Armor piercing halves the effectiveness of the defender's defense rating.
zh: 破甲使防禦者的防禦值效果減半。

source: First strike allows the unit to deal its damage before hand-to- hand attacks, but after breath, thrown, and gaze attacks.
zh: 先制攻擊讓該單位能在近身肉搏攻擊之前造成傷害，但在吐息、投擲與凝視攻擊之後。

source: Weapon ability that does half its attack strength in damage automatically -- no to-hit roll, no resistance, no defense.
zh: 一種武器能力，自動造成其攻擊強度一半的傷害——無需命中骰、不受抗性、不受防禦影響。

source: Weapon ability that causes the target to make a resistance roll or be disintegrated.
zh: 一種武器能力，使目標進行抗性檢定，否則遭到瓦解。

source: Stoning touch makes one enemy unit resist or be turned to stone in addition to any other hand-to-hand attack.
zh: 石化觸碰使一個敵方單位除了承受其他任何近身肉搏攻擊外，還必須抵抗，否則化為石頭。

source: Special ability that causes the target to save at -3 or die.
zh: 一種特殊能力，使目標以-3的減值進行檢定，否則死亡。

source: Calls upon the forces of light to envelop a target chaos or death creature (unit) with holy fires. A unit unable to withstand (at a penalty of 4 to resistance) the bright, holy flames is instantly destroyed. Units that are undead (black channeled or animated) are particularly susceptible to this spell, having to resist its effects at a penalty of 10.
zh: 召喚光明之力，以神聖火焰包圍目標混沌或死亡生物（單位）。無法承受（抗性附帶4的減值）這明亮神聖火焰的單位將被立即消滅。不死單位（受黑暗通道或喚醒之亡者）對此法術尤其脆弱，必須以10的減值抵抗其效果。

source: Adds demon-skin armor (+2 defense).
zh: 增加惡魔皮護甲（防禦+2）。

source: Adds demon wings (2 speed flight).
zh: 增加惡魔之翼（2速飛行）。

source: Adds a 2 strength fiery breath.
zh: 增加一道強度 2 的火焰吐息。

source: Thrown weapons allows an attacking unit to hurl its thrown weapons before engaging in hand-to-hand.
zh: 投擲武器讓進攻單位在進入近身肉搏前先擲出投擲武器。

source: Fire breath allows an attacking unit to breathe a fiery blast before engaging in hand-to-hand.
zh: 火焰吐息讓進攻單位在進入近身肉搏前先噴出一道烈焰。

source: Lightning breath allows an attacking unit to breathe an armor piercing blast of lightning before entering hand-to-hand.
zh: 閃電吐息讓進攻單位在進入近身肉搏前先噴出一道可穿透護甲的閃電。

source: Doom gaze is a gaze attack that automatically does damage, with no to-hit or defense rolls.
zh: 厄運凝視是一種凝視攻擊，會自動造成傷害，無需命中或防禦判定。

source: Death gaze makes all enemy units resist or die instantly. The gaze takes effect before actual melee is entered.
zh: 死亡凝視使所有敵方單位進行抵抗判定，否則立即死亡。此凝視在實際近戰開始前生效。

source: Immolation strikes all enemy units engaged in hand-to-hand with a fire attack of strength 4.
zh: 焚身術以強度 4 的火焰攻擊打擊所有與其進行近身肉搏的敵方單位。

source: Unit is impervious to all missile attacks (Missile Immunity).
zh: 單位對所有遠程攻擊免疫（遠程免疫）。

source: Unit fights (melee) with twice normal strength (swords) while disregarding its own safety (defense of zero, regardless of other defense modifiers).
zh: 單位以兩倍的正常近戰強度（劍）作戰，但完全不顧自身安危（防禦歸零，無視其他防禦修正）。

source: Creature is now a vile undead being with +3 melee attack strength (swords), +1 to missile attack strength (bows), breath attacks, hit points (hearts), resistance (crosses) and defense (shields).
zh: 生物化為邪惡的不死存在，近戰攻擊強度（劍）+3，並使遠程攻擊強度（弓）、吐息攻擊、生命值（心）、抵抗（十字）與防禦（盾）+1。

source: Unit has weapon immunity and an insubstantial wraith-like form (the unit is non-corporeal). In addition, the unit may move on the overland map as if every land square was a road.
zh: 單位獲得武器免疫與虛幻的幽魂形態（單位為非實體）。此外，單位在大地圖上移動時，視每個陸地格皆為道路。

source: Endows the target unit with the ability to regenerate during combat (by 1 hit point/ turn) and afterwards (by an immediate return to full health at the end of combat). If the creature dies in combat it returns from the dead in a state of full health, if its side won the battle. Note that this spell is not able to return a creature that has been banished or unsummoned (banish, death wish, holy word, unsummon).
zh: 賦予目標單位在戰鬥中再生（每回合 1 點生命值）以及戰鬥後再生（戰鬥結束時立即回復至滿血）的能力。若該生物在戰鬥中死亡，只要其陣營贏得該場戰役，便會以滿血狀態起死回生。注意此法術無法使被放逐或被遣返的生物復生（放逐術、求死術、神聖言語、遣返）。

source: Endows the target unit (and any units currently stacked with that unit) with the ability to travel over all land terrain as if it were traveling on roads (i.e., the cost is only 1/2 movement point per square).
zh: 賦予目標單位（以及當前與該單位疊放的所有單位）在所有陸地地形上移動時皆視為行走於道路的能力（即每格只消耗 1/2 移動力）。

source: Improves a unit's defenses (shields) and resistance to Chaos and Nature magic (crosses), by 10 each. These bonuses do not exert cumulative effects with the spell resist elements.
zh: 使單位的防禦（盾）以及對混沌與自然魔法的抵抗（十字）各提升 10。這些加成與「元素抗性」法術不會產生累加效果。

source: Instills in target unit an increased resistance (+3) to the elemental magics of chaos and nature. In addition, the unit gains improved defenses to normal magic ranged attacks (+3 to ranged defense).
zh: 賦予目標單位對混沌與自然元素魔法更高的抵抗（+3）。此外，單位對普通魔法遠程攻擊的防禦也獲得提升（遠程防禦 +3）。

source: Renders the unit invisible to all units, except those immune to illusion and those that have True Sight. In combat, the unit becomes visible when adjacent to an enemy unit, but still penalizes the to-hit roll of enemy units by -2.
zh: 使單位對所有單位隱形，但對幻象免疫者及擁有真實視覺者除外。在戰鬥中，單位與敵方單位相鄰時會現形，但仍使敵方單位的命中判定 -2。

source: Bestows the power of flight upon the unit.
zh: 賦予單位飛行能力。

source: Endows the unit with a tremendously improved resistance (+3 crosses) to negative spells from all magic realms!
zh: 賦予單位對所有魔法領域的負面法術大幅提升的抵抗（+3 十字）！

source: Unit is completely immune to all magic spells and their effects, breath and gaze attacks. Unit's defense (shields) is raised to 50 against all magic ranged and melee attacks.
zh: 單位對所有魔法法術及其效果、吐息與凝視攻擊完全免疫。單位的防禦（盾）對所有魔法遠程與近戰攻擊提升至 50。

source: Adds +2 attack strengths to both melee and missile attacks. Flaming weapons can hit creatures with Weapon Immunity and exert cumulative effects with eldritch weapon.
zh: 對近戰與遠程攻擊各增加 +2 攻擊強度。烈焰武器能命中具武器免疫的生物，並與「邪能武器」產生累加效果。

source: Ranged and melee attacks are harder to defend against (an opponent's ability to defend decreases by one; i.e., each shield loses 10% in its ability to block a hit) and can effectively hit creatures that have Weapon Immunity. Eldritch weapon exerts cumulative effects with flame blade.
zh: 遠程與近戰攻擊更難防禦（對手的防禦能力降低 1；即每面盾牌格擋命中的能力降低 10%），並能有效命中具武器免疫的生物。邪能武器與烈焰刃產生累加效果。

source: The unit does not suffer from the ignores-armor effect of illusionary attacks, always makes resistance rolls for Sorcery spells, and can see invisible units and through Walls of Darkness.
zh: 單位不受幻象攻擊無視護甲效果的影響，對祕法法術一律進行抵抗判定，並能看見隱形單位及看穿黑暗之牆。

source: Blesses the unit's weapons, allowing them to hit creatures which are immune to non-magical attacks and giving a +1 to-hit bonus in combat.
zh: 為單位的武器賜福，使其能命中對非魔法攻擊免疫的生物，並在戰鬥中給予 +1 命中加成。

source: Adds +3 to the unit's defense and resistance against all death or chaos related spells or monster attacks.
zh: 使單位的防禦及對所有死亡或混沌相關法術或怪物攻擊的抵抗 +3。

source: Adds + 3 to the unit's attack strength, hits, and resistance.
zh: 使單位的攻擊強度、生命與抵抗 +3。

source: Adds +1 to each figure's melee attack strength.
zh: 使每個個體的近戰攻擊強度 +1。

source: Allows the unit to shift planes at will, back and forth. While the unit is active and the plane is changed, the unit will move back and forth between planes.
zh: 使單位能隨意在位面間來回轉移。當單位處於啟動狀態且位面改變時，單位將在位面之間來回移動。

source: The units' defense is increased by +3.
zh: 單位的防禦 +3。

source: Protected unit gains almost total immunity from death and chaos magic.
zh: 受保護的單位幾乎完全免疫死亡與混沌魔法。

source: The unit is resistant to damage from non-magical attacks, and the first two hits sustained by the unit from any attack are ignored.
zh: 單位對非魔法攻擊造成的傷害具抵抗力，且受到任何攻擊的前兩次命中會被忽略。

source: If the unit fails to resist, it loses -2 from its chance to hit and all attackers gain a +2 to hit.
zh: 若單位抵抗失敗，其命中機率 -2，且所有攻擊者獲得 +2 命中。

source: If the victim unit fails to resist at -4, it becomes confused. At the beginning of each turn, the effects of this spell will be determined randomly from this list: 1) unit stands confused, 2) unit moves randomly, 3) unit is controlled by opponent, and 4) no effect.
zh: 若受害單位以 -4 抵抗失敗，便會陷入混亂。每回合開始時，此法術的效果將從以下清單隨機決定：1) 單位陷入混亂、2) 單位隨機移動、3) 單位受對手控制、4) 無效果。

source: All creatures within the unit lose -5 to their attacks, defense, and resistance rolls. Mind storm is automatic and does not have a resistance roll. The spell does not work against units immune to illusions.
zh: 單位內所有生物的攻擊、防禦與抵抗判定 -5。心靈風暴為自動生效，無抵抗判定。此法術對幻象免疫的單位無效。

source: Attempts to shatter all the weapons in a normal target unit. The unit gets one chance to resist these powers of chaos; if it is unsuccessful all of the unit's melee, thrown, and missile attack strengths decrease to one.
zh: 試圖摧毀普通目標單位的所有武器。單位有一次機會抵抗這股混沌之力；若失敗，單位的所有近戰、投擲與遠程攻擊強度均降為 1。

source: Saps the strength out of a target unit's creatures, who suffer a penalty of 2 to their melee, thrown and ranged attack strengths. Units get no chance to resist.
zh: 削弱目標單位生物的力量，使其近戰、投擲與遠程攻擊強度受到 2 點懲罰。單位無抵抗機會。

source: Reduces the attack strength of the unit by half.
zh: 使單位的攻擊強度減半。

source: All enemy spell casters are drained 5 mana each combat turn This includes the opponent wizard you are currently battling. Additionally, all units with magical ranged attacks lose one spell shot each turn.
zh: 每個戰鬥回合，所有敵方施法者各被汲取 5 法力，包括你當前正在交戰的對手巫師。此外，所有具魔法遠程攻擊的單位每回合損失一次法術射擊。

source: Web entangles an enemy unit in a web which traps the unit where it stands.
zh: 蛛網將敵方單位困在網中，使其無法離開原地。

source: Possessed unit fights for the casting wizard until combat ends. Fantastic creatures and heroes may not be possessed.
zh: 被附身的單位為施法巫師作戰直到戰鬥結束。奇幻生物與英雄無法被附身。

source: This indicates how much gold, food, and magic it costs to maintain this unit each turn.
zh: 此項表示維持此單位每回合所需的金幣、食物與魔力花費。

source: By Clicking on the overland map, you can select where you want your engineers to build a road. A red line indicates that a road cannot be constructed over that path, while a blue line indicates a valid path. The number of turns it will take to complete construction of the road is also displayed.
zh: 點擊大地圖即可選擇你要工程兵建造道路的位置。紅線表示該路徑無法建造道路，藍線則表示有效路徑。完成道路建造所需的回合數也會一併顯示。

source: Leadership increases the attack strength of all units in combat by one per 2 levels of the hero. Super leadership (*) increases this bonus by 50%.
zh: 領導力使戰鬥中所有單位的攻擊力，每英雄 2 級增加 1。超級領導力（*）使此加成提升 50%。

source: Armsmaster adds 2 experience to all units stacked with the hero at the end of each turn, per level of experience. Additional levels of Armsmaster increases this bonus by 50%.
zh: 武器大師在每回合結束時，依經驗等級為與英雄同格的所有單位增加 2 點經驗。額外的武器大師等級使此加成提升 50%。

source: Constitution increases the hero's hits beyond human norms, adding the +1/level to the hero's defense. Super constitution (*) increases this bonus by 50%.
zh: 體質使英雄的生命值超越常人，為英雄的防禦每等級增加 +1。超級體質（*）使此加成提升 50%。

source: The unit has the ability to merge with the earth, pass through it, and reform itself at its destination.
zh: 此單位能夠與大地融合、穿行其中，並在目的地重新成形。

source: Teleporting allows a unit to move anywhere on the combat map for a cost of 1 movement point.
zh: 傳送使單位能以 1 點移動力移動到戰鬥地圖上的任何位置。

source: Pathfinding allows the unit and all stacked with it to move across any land square at the cost of 1/2 movement point.
zh: 尋路使該單位及與其同格的所有單位能以 1/2 點移動力穿越任何陸地格。

source: Undead creatures never heal normally or magically and gain all the immunities and vulnerabilities of Death creatures. In addition Undead fantastic creatures have a 50% higher maintenance cost.
zh: 不死生物永遠無法以一般或魔法方式治癒，並獲得死亡生物的所有免疫與弱點。此外，不死的奇幻生物維護費用高出 50%。

source: Places all units in the targeted overland map square in stasis for 1 turn. Thereafter, each unit in stasis must resist at -3 to be freed.
zh: 使目標大地圖格上的所有單位進入停滯 1 回合。此後，處於停滯的每個單位必須以 -3 抵抗才能脫困。

source: Unit regenerates during combat (by 1 hit point/ turn) and afterwards (by an immediate return to full health at the end of combat). If the creature dies in combat it returns from the dead in a state of full health, if its side won the battle. Note that this spell is not able to return a creature that has been banished or unsummoned (banish, death wish, holy word, unsummon).
zh: 單位在戰鬥中再生（每回合 1 點生命值），戰鬥後亦然（在戰鬥結束時立即恢復至滿血）。若該生物在戰鬥中死亡，且其陣營贏得戰鬥，它將以滿血狀態起死回生。請注意，此法術無法使已被放逐或遣返的生物復返（放逐術、求死術、神聖言語、遣返）。

source: Pathfinding allows the unit and all stacked with it to move across any land square at the cost of one movement point.
zh: 尋路使該單位及與其同格的所有單位能以 1 點移動力穿越任何陸地格。

source: Allows the unit to shift back and forth between planes at will. Changing planes while the unit is active will move the unit between planes.
zh: 使該單位能隨意在位面之間來回轉移。當單位處於行動狀態時改變位面，會使該單位在位面之間移動。

source: Surrounds the unit with a magically protective wall of air, making the unit almost totally immune to arrow and sling attacks.
zh: 以具魔法防護的氣牆環繞該單位，使其幾乎完全免疫弓箭與投石攻擊。

source: The hero can use any weapon including staves, bows, and wands.
zh: 此英雄能使用任何武器，包括法杖、弓與魔杖。

source: The spell button allows you to throw spells.
zh: 法術按鈕讓你能施放法術。

source: The info button will show you what overland enchantments, city spells, and nodes affect the combat.
zh: 資訊按鈕會顯示有哪些大地附魔、城市法術與節點影響此戰鬥。

source: Range is a multiplier that effects the mana cost of a spell. The farther away the combat is from your Tower, the greater the multiplier.
zh: 範圍是影響法術法力花費的乘數。戰鬥距離你的塔越遠，乘數越大。

source: All creatures of life are bathed in the light's glow and gain one to their attack strengths (swords), defense (shield), and resistance (cross). Creatures of death are hampered by the brightness, losing one to each of their attack strengths, defense, and resistance. True Light and Darkness exert opposite effects and therefore cancel each other's effects.
zh: 所有生命生物沐浴在光芒之中，攻擊力（劍）、防禦（盾）與抗性（十字）各增加 1。死亡生物則受亮光所擾，攻擊力、防禦與抗性各減少 1。真光術與黑暗術發揮相反的效果，因此會相互抵消。

source: Creatures of death gain one point each in attack strength (swords), defense (shields) and resistance (crosses). Creatures of life, on the other hand, are dispirited and lose one point each in attack strength, defense and resistance. True Light and Darkness exert opposite effects and therefore cancel each other's effects.
zh: 死亡生物的攻擊力（劍）、防禦（盾）與抗性（十字）各增加 1 點。另一方面，生命生物則士氣低落，攻擊力、防禦與抗性各減少 1 點。真光術與黑暗術發揮相反的效果，因此會相互抵消。

source: Distorts ALL (both friendly and enemy) non-chaos units' perception of reality. Affected units suffer a penalty to hit of two (20%).
zh: 扭曲所有（友方與敵方皆然）非混沌單位對現實的感知。受影響單位的命中受到 2 點（20%）的減值。

source: Curses all enemy units, weakening their attack strength (swords) and defense (shields) by one. Their resistance to magic (crosses) is decreased by two.
zh: 詛咒所有敵方單位，使其攻擊力（劍）與防禦（盾）減弱 1。其對魔法的抗性（十字）則減少 2。

source: Wracks all non-death creatures with the agonies of darkness every combat turn. All enemy figures that cannot resist this pain lose one hit point.
zh: 每個戰鬥回合，以黑暗的苦痛摧殘所有非死亡生物。所有無法抵抗此痛楚的敵方個體將失去 1 點生命值。

source: Flaming melee and missile weapons have a +1 attack strength and can inflict damage on units with Weapon Immunity. Metal fires and flame blade do not exert cumulative effects.
zh: 燃焰的近戰與遠程武器擁有 +1 攻擊力，並能對具備武器免疫的單位造成傷害。金屬烈焰與烈焰刃不會發揮疊加效果。

source: Unit with High Prayer has its attack strength (swords), ability to hit, and defense (shields) all increased by 2 (20% improvement in each area), while resistance (crosses) is increased by 3 and the ability to block an attack and to hit is increased by 10%.
zh: 受高等祈禱的單位，其攻擊力（劍）、命中能力與防禦（盾）皆增加 2（各方面提升 20%），抗性（十字）則增加 3，而格擋攻擊與命中的能力增加 10%。

source: Calls down a powerful electrical storm from which deadly lightning bolts issue. Three to 5 lightning bolts of strength 8 strike random opponents at the beginning of every turn until the end of combat.
zh: 召喚一場強大的雷電風暴，從中射出致命的閃電。在每回合開始時，3 到 5 道強度 8 的閃電會擊中隨機的對手，直到戰鬥結束。

source: Creates a standing dispel magic spell over the entire battlefield. A spell cast by the enemy wizard or an enemy hero must first overcome the effects of this dispel magic spell (of strength equal to the magic power poured into the counter magic spell) before it can exert its effects. Every spell cast by the enemy drains the magic power (strength) of the counter magic spell by 5 mana points and, therefore, lessens its effectiveness against subsequent spells.
zh: 在整個戰場上設置一道常駐的解除魔法法術。敵方巫師或敵方英雄施放的法術，必須先克服此解除魔法法術的效果（其強度等同於灌注進反制魔法法術的魔力），才能發揮效用。敵方施放的每個法術都會使反制魔法法術的魔力（強度）耗損 5 點法力，因此降低其對後續法術的有效性。

source: As invisibility except all friendly units are rendered invisible.
zh: 與隱形相同，差別在於所有友方單位皆被隱形。

source: Dispels all non-Sorcery magic.
zh: 解除所有非秘術魔法。

source: Dispels all non-Chaos magic.
zh: 解除所有非混沌魔法。

source: Dispels all non-Nature magic.
zh: 解除所有非自然魔法。

source: Being under the influence of a Sorcery node adds +2 attack and +2 defense to all Sorcery creatures.
zh: 處於秘術節點的影響之下，會為所有秘術生物增加 +2 攻擊與 +2 防禦。

source: Being under the influence of a Chaos node adds +2 attack and +2 defense to all Chaos creatures.
zh: 處於混沌節點的影響之下，會為所有混沌生物增加 +2 攻擊與 +2 防禦。

source: Being under the influence of a Nature node adds +2 attack and +2 defense to all Nature creatures.
zh: 處於自然節點的影響之下，會為所有自然生物增加 +2 攻擊與 +2 防禦。

source: Envelops the target friendly city in a dense cloud of darkness (equivalent in effect to the darkness spell). All combat in the city takes place under this effect.
zh: 以濃密的黑暗之雲籠罩目標友方城市（效果等同於黑暗術）。城市中的所有戰鬥都在此效果下進行。

source: Bathes a target friendly city in life-enhancing rays from the heavens, aiding creatures of life and dispiriting creatures of death (equivalent in effect to true light). All combat in the city takes place as if true light were cast.
zh: 以來自天堂、增進生命的光芒沐浴目標友方城市，助益生命生物並使死亡生物士氣低落（效果等同於真光術）。城市中的所有戰鬥都如同施放了真光術般進行。

source: Endows ALL creatures of chaos with destructive power increasing their melee (swords), missile, magic and Fiery Breath attack strengths by two.
zh: 賦予所有混沌生物毀滅之力，使其近戰（劍）、遠程、魔法與烈焰吐息的攻擊力增加 2。
