source: Causes an impenetrable mantle of blackness to smother all the lands in the worlds. This thick cloak of blackness has the same effect as Darkness cast on every map square. Only map squares protected by Heavenly Light are unaffected.
zh: 使一層無法穿透的黑暗罩幕籠罩世界中的所有土地。這層濃厚的黑暗斗篷具有如同在每個地圖格施放黑暗術的效果。唯有受天堂之光保護的地圖格不受影響。

source: Calls upon the heavens to bless all friendly normal units' weapons, giving them +1 (i.e., +10%) to hit and the ability to hit creatures with Weapon Immunity. This effect is not cumulative with holy weapon.
zh: 祈求上天祝福所有友方常規單位的武器，給予其 +1（即 +10%）命中，以及攻擊具備武器免疫之生物的能力。此效果不與神聖武器疊加。

source: Causes all normal units that die in any combat to become, after the battle ends, mindless zombies under the control of the casting wizard. These zombies do not heal in any way, nor can they be raised from the dead.
zh: 使在任何戰鬥中死亡的所有常規單位，在戰鬥結束後變成受施法巫師控制的無心智殭屍。這些殭屍無法以任何方式治癒，也無法被復生。

source: Increases the defense of the unit by +1 per level of experience. Super Agility (*) increases this bonus by +50%.
zh: 使該單位的防禦每經驗等級增加 +1。超級敏捷（*）使此加成提升 +50%。

source: Causes all non-flying, corporeal enemy creatures to suffer a loss of one movement point per turn. If a creature's movement points are zero, it may not attack or move for the remainder of the combat; the creature can still strike back if attacked.
zh: 使所有非飛行的實體敵方生物每回合損失一點移動力。若生物的移動力為零，則在剩餘的戰鬥中無法攻擊或移動；該生物若遭受攻擊仍能反擊。

source: Controls how skillfully the enemy races play.
zh: 控制敵方種族的遊玩技巧程度。

source: At this setting all enemy operations are at normal levels.
zh: 在此設定下，所有敵方運作均為正常水準。

source: Creates many small island-size continents that represent about 15% of the worlds size.
zh: 創造許多島嶼大小的小型大陸，約占世界面積的 15%。

source: Creates average size continents that take up about 20% of the worlds.
zh: 創造中等大小的大陸，約占世界面積的 20%。

source: Lands take up approximately 25% of the world size and provide for huge areas to expand into.
zh: 陸地約占世界面積的 25%，提供廣大的擴張空間。

source: Determines the strength of the magic nodes. In Myrror, all nodes produce twice the normal level of power on Arcanus.
zh: 決定魔法節點的強度。在 Myrror，所有節點產生的魔力是 Arcanus 正常水準的兩倍。

source:
Effects: Global Enchantment
Target: yourself
Casting Cost: 1000
Upkeep none
When your enchanted fortress is captured by an enemy you are banished to Limbo until you finish casting the Spell of Return. You may not cast any other spells while banished and you receive no power income.
zh:
效果：全域附魔
目標：自身
施法花費：1000
維護 無
當你附魔的要塞被敵人佔領時，你會被放逐到 Limbo，直到你完成施放歸返咒語為止。被放逐期間你無法施放任何其他法術，且不會獲得任何魔力收入。

source: Nomad Sorcerer. He has the special ability of Alchemy which allows him to exchange gold and power without loss and gives all units built in cities magic weapons.
zh: 游牧法師。他擁有煉金術的特殊能力，能讓他無損地兌換金幣與魔力，並使所有在城市中建造的單位獲得魔法武器。

source: Elementalist that specializes in chaos and nature magic. He has the ability of Mana Focusing which increases the power he obtains from his mana reserve by 25%.
zh: 專精於混沌與自然魔法的元素法師。他擁有法力聚焦能力，使他從法力儲備中獲得的魔力提升 25%。

source: Demonic force specializing in chaos magic. He has the ability of Chaos Mastery which increases his chaos research by 10%, makes it twice as hard to dispel his spells, and doubles the magic power he receives from chaos nodes.
zh: 專精於混沌魔法的惡魔勢力。他擁有混沌精通能力，使他的混沌研究提升 10%、使其法術被解除的難度加倍，並使他從混沌節點獲得的魔力加倍。

source: Warlock specializing in death magic. He also possesses Infernal Power which doubles the power and pacifying effects received from shrines, temples, and parthenons.
zh: 專精於死亡魔法的術士。他還擁有地獄之力，使他從神龕、神殿與帕德嫩神廟獲得的魔力與安撫效果加倍。

source: Elvish sylph that specializes in nature magic. She has the special ability of Nature Mastery which increases her nature research by 10%, makes it twice as hard to dispel her spells, and doubles the power she receives from nature nodes.
zh: 專精於自然魔法的精靈氣精。她擁有自然精通的特殊能力，使她的自然研究提升 10%、使其法術被解除的難度加倍，並使她從自然節點獲得的魔力加倍。

source: High priestess specializing in life magic. She is Charismatic which halves the cost of hero, mercenary, and magic items, doubles the effect of good and halves that of bad diplomatic actions.
zh: 專精於生命魔法的高階女祭司。她具有魅力，能使英雄、傭兵與魔法物品的花費減半，並使良性外交行動的效果加倍、惡性外交行動的效果減半。

source: Aztec priest who specializes in nature and death magic. He possesses the special ability of Warlord which adds +1 level to all of his units, allowing them to rise above their limit of elite
zh: 專精於自然與死亡魔法的阿茲特克祭司。他擁有戰將的特殊能力，使他所有單位獲得 +1 等級，讓它們得以突破菁英的上限

source: Controls whether or not you will view when overland enchantment spells are thrown on your cities or enemy cities.
zh: 控制當大地附魔法術施放於你的城市或敵方城市時，你是否會看到。

source: Controls whether spells on your spell book are ordered in categories versus one long list.
zh: 控制你法術書中的法術是依類別排序，還是排成一長串清單。

source: Allows the wizard to cast spells in combat as if the battle took place at his fortress, which means channeler does not spend any extra mana when casting any spell in combat. In addition, a channeler only pays one half the normal spell maintenance. Channeler costs 2 picks.
zh: 讓巫師在戰鬥中施法時，如同戰鬥發生在自己要塞一般，這表示引導者在戰鬥中施放任何法術時不會花費任何額外法力。此外，引導者只需支付一半的正常法術維護費。引導者花費 2 點選項。

source: Increases the wizard's skill by +10, and makes it twice as hard to dispel any of his spells. Also, there is a 50% bonus to all mana spent on increasing skill.
zh: 使巫師的技能提升 +10，並使其任何法術被解除的難度加倍。此外，所有用於提升技能的法力都有 50% 的加成。

source: Reduces the cost of making magical items by 50%. Artificers also begin the game with the Create Magic Item and Create Artifact spells.
zh: 使製作魔法物品的花費減少 50%。神器師還會在遊戲開始時擁有製造魔法物品與製造神器法術。

source: Reduces the casting and research costs of all summoning spells by 25% and also reduces the maintenance costs of fantastic creatures by 25%.
zh: 使所有召喚法術的施法與研究花費減少 25%，並使奇幻生物的維護費減少 25%。

source: Wizard begins the game in a city on Myrror instead of Arcanus. The Myrran wizard starts with an unusual race: beastmen, dark elves, draconians, dwarves, and trolls. In addition the wizard's fortress generates 5 additional mana. The Myrran special costs 3 spell picks.
zh: 巫師在 Myrror 而非 Arcanus 的城市開始遊戲。Myrran 巫師會以一個特殊種族開局：獸人、黑暗精靈、龍人、矮人與巨魔。此外，巫師的要塞會額外產生 5 點法力。Myrran 特性花費 3 點法術選項。

source: Wizard begins the game with 10 fame. Furthermore, being famous doubles the chance of a wizard hiring heroes, recruiting mercenaries, and buying magical items.
zh: 巫師在遊戲開始時擁有 10 點聲望。此外，享有盛名會使巫師雇用英雄、招募傭兵與購買魔法物品的機率加倍。

source: Possesses an unnatural presence that dramatically improves his dealings with others. The charismatic wizard pays half for hiring heroes, mercenaries, and purchasing magical items. In addition, all diplomatic penalties from negative actions are halved and good diplomatic effects are doubled.
zh: 擁有一種非凡的氣場，能大幅改善他與他人的往來。具魅力的巫師雇用英雄、傭兵與購買魔法物品只需支付一半費用。此外，所有來自負面行動的外交懲罰都會減半，而良性外交效果則會加倍。

source: A special setting used to produce trade goods and convert 2 production to 1 gold. No other bonus will increase the trade goods gold revenues, including prosperity.
zh: 此特殊設定用於生產貿易品，並將 2 生產轉換為 1 金幣。沒有任何其他加成能提升貿易品的金幣收入，包括繁榮術。

source: A special setting used to build new housing for the local populace to draw them into the city and increase the city's population growth rate.
zh: 此特殊設定用於為當地居民建造新住宅，以吸引人口遷入城市並提升城市的人口成長率。

source: Maintenance: 0 gold/turn\nBarracks allow a city to train and organize military units.
zh: 維護：0 金幣/回合\n兵營讓城市能夠訓練並組織軍事單位。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nA sawmill will turn wood into deadly weaponry. It increases the production of forest squares by 25%.
zh: 維護：2 金幣/回合\n鋸木廠將木材加工為致命武器。使森林格的生產提升 25%。

source: Maintenance: 3 gold/turn\nThe alchemists' guild equips all new troops with magical weapons with +1 to hit and +3 mana is generated.
zh: 維護：3 金幣/回合\n煉金公會為所有新兵配備命中 +1 的魔法武器，並產生 +3 法力。

source: Maintenance: 5 gold/turn\nA wizard's guild acts as a center for the study and teaching of magic. It adds +8 spell research points at an upkeep cost of 3 mana points a turn.
zh: 維護：5 金幣/回合\n巫師公會作為魔法研究與教學的中心。法術研究點數 +8，每回合維護費 3 點法力。

source: Maintenance: 1 gold/turn\nA shrine provides the people of the city with a center for spiritual comfort. It adds +1 mana, allows use of nightshade, and reduces the unrest level by 1.
zh: 維護：1 金幣/回合\n神龕為城市的人民提供心靈慰藉的中心。法力 +1、允許使用夜影草，並使動亂等級 -1。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nA temple serves as a center for basic religious instruction. It adds +2 mana, allows use of nightshade, and reduces the unrest level by 1.
zh: 維護：2 金幣/回合\n神殿作為基礎宗教教育的中心。法力 +2、允許使用夜影草，並使動亂等級 -1。

source: Maintenance: 3 gold/turn\nA parthenon is a centralized locale for the study of religion. It adds +3 mana and reduces the unrest by 1.
zh: 維護：3 金幣/回合\n帕德嫩神廟是宗教研究的集中場所。法力 +3，動亂 -1。

source: Maintenance: 4 gold/turn\nA cathedral provides the city with a cultural and religious center. It adds +4 mana and reduces the unrest level by 1.
zh: 維護：4 金幣/回合\n大教堂為城市提供文化與宗教中心。法力 +4，動亂等級 -1。

source: Maintenance: 1 gold/turn\nA marketplace promotes the city's economic growth by increasing the taxable revenues of the city by +50%.
zh: 維護：1 金幣/回合\n市集促進城市經濟成長，使城市的應稅收入提升 +50%。

source: Maintenance: 3 gold/turn\nA bank increases the taxable revenues of the city by +50%, in addition to the marketplace.
zh: 維護：3 金幣/回合\n銀行在市集之外，再使城市的應稅收入提升 +50%。

source: Maintenance: 5 gold/turn\nA merchant's guild increases the taxable revenues of a city by +100%, in addition to the marketplace and bank.
zh: 維護：5 金幣/回合\n商人公會在市集與銀行之外，再使城市的應稅收入提升 +100%。

source: Maintenance: 1 gold/turn\nA granary serves as a storehouse for the city's food surplus. It adds +2 food and +20 people per turn.
zh: 維護：1 金幣/回合\n穀倉作為城市糧食盈餘的儲藏所。食物 +2，每回合人口 +20。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nA farmer's market acts as a centralized location for the buying and selling of the city's food surplus. It adds +3 food and +30 people per turn.
zh: 維護：2 金幣/回合\n農夫市集作為城市糧食盈餘買賣的集中場所。食物 +3，每回合人口 +30。

source: Maintenance: 2 gold/turn\nA forester's guild trains experienced hunters and lumberjacks, increasing the food harvest by +2 and production by +25%.
zh: 維護：2 金幣/回合\n林務公會訓練經驗豐富的獵人與伐木工，食物產量 +2，生產 +25%。

source: Maintenance: 1 gold/turn\nThe builder's hall educates workers in skilled building techniques.
zh: 維護：1 金幣/回合\n建造者大廳教導工人精熟建造技術。

source: Dark rituals and sacrifices to the death gods doubles the power generated from shrines, temples, parthenons, and cathedrals. Population growth is reduced by 25%, and unrest increases by 1.
zh: 向死亡神祇進行黑暗儀式與獻祭，使神龕、神殿、帕德嫩神廟與大教堂所產生的魔力加倍。人口成長率降低25%，動亂+1。

source: The altar of battle elevates all the city's units to elite level.
zh: 戰鬥祭壇將城市所有單位提升至精英等級。

source: All enemy spell casters are drained 5 mana each combat turn. This includes the opponent wizard you are currently battling. Additionally, all units with magical ranged attacks lose one spell shot each turn.
zh: 所有敵方施法者每個戰鬥回合被汲取5法力。這包括你當前正在交戰的對手巫師。此外，所有具備魔法遠程攻擊的單位每回合損失一次法術射擊。

source: This is the actual population of the city and the population growth rate shown in parenthesis. Each townsfolk figure represents 1000 townsfolk. The growth rate is how many people the city grows each turn.
zh: 這是城市的實際人口，括號中顯示人口成長率。每個市民圖示代表1000名市民。成長率是城市每回合增加的人口數。

source: Maniacal wizards hate everyone, halving effects of positive diplomacy and doubling the diplomatic effects of hostile actions.
zh: 狂躁的巫師憎恨所有人，使正面外交的效果減半，並使敵對行動的外交效果加倍。

source: Wizard pacts are mutual agreements not to attack the opponent wizard or enter his/her territory. You agree not to move within 2 squares of any of the wizard's cities. The wizard pact does not immediately effect diplomatic relations, but instead improves the relations as long as the treaty is enforced.
zh: 巫師條約是不攻擊對手巫師、也不進入其領土的相互協議。你同意不移動到該巫師任何城市的2格範圍內。巫師條約不會立即影響外交關係，而是只要條約持續執行，便逐步改善關係。

source: An alliance is a stronger version of a wizard pact. The alliance also carries with if the expectation that the allied wizard will come to the aid of the ally should someone declare war on them. The alliance does not immediately effect diplomatic relations, but instead improves the relations as long as the treaty is enforced.
zh: 同盟是巫師條約的強化版本。同盟還附帶一項期望：若有人對盟友宣戰，結盟的巫師將前來相助。同盟不會立即影響外交關係，而是只要條約持續執行，便逐步改善關係。

source: Blurs the outline all friendly units making them more difficult to hit. There is a 10% chance that each point of damage done will miss.
zh: 模糊所有友方單位的輪廓，使其更難被擊中。每點造成的傷害有10%機率落空。

source: You recieve 1/2 a point for every thousand townsfolk you have in all cities that you control.
zh: 你所控制的所有城市中，每一千名市民可獲得1/2點。
